claim: Nyateƒe Ŋuti Gbedede: Belgium dziɖuɖumegãa mebia tso Belgiumtɔwo si be woadzo le Belgium alo Europa o
evidence: Dudzikpɔla aɖe bia tso eƒe dziɖula si be ame siwo ŋu Islam ƒe awuwo ɖea fu na le Brussels ƒe nuto aɖe me la si be woayi aɖanɔ Belgium ƒe dugã la ƒe akpa bubu me, ke menye Belgitɔwo be woadzo le dukɔa alo Europa o, le esi to Internet dzi nyatakaka siwo amewo dea asii la ƒe tomaɖomaɖo ta.Woɖe video si me Saliha Raiss ƒo nu le Molenbeek-Saint-Jean dzi le August 27 dzi le woƒe hame ƒe kpekpe aɖe dzi le Instagram dzi kple nya si wògblɔ be yeadi be "Europa si me ame aɖeke mele Europatɔwo o".September 1 lia dzi la, yeʋu tab bubu aɖe si me Raiss ƒo nu tsoe alakpatɔe be: "Ame siwo mate ŋu axɔ vidadawo alo Islam si wotsi le Belgium o la, naɖe mɔ woadzo!Reuters Foto si dzi kpɔ ame aɖe le la, si ƒe ŋkɔe nye: Belgiatɔwo dzo le Belgium! Esia nye numamewɔwɔ. Eɖe mɔ be ame siwo katã kpɔ gome le video si me Raissek ɖe mɔ̃ si me la xɔ ame siwo ŋu dzeɖoɖo na Moslemtɔwo le Belgium ƒe aƒea

claim: Tso ƒe 2020 ƒe akɔntabubu la dzi la, Florida "tso Democrat akpa gãtɔ va zu Republican akpa si le ame miliɔn 1.5 ta".
evidence: DeSantis ɖe anyigbatata sia ɖe Fox News dzi le April 27 lia dzi hafi naɖo eŋu na dukɔa ƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe. Egblɔ be anyigbatata yeye si wotaa zi geɖe le ƒe 10 ɖesiaɖe me le akɔntabubu megbe la anye Florida ƒe tiatiawɔblɔɖe si sɔ. "Florida tsi anyi le ƒe 2020 ƒe akɔntabubu me, eye míedoa gbe ɖa ɖe tiatiawɔblɔɖe si sɔ ta tso ɣemaɣi la ta", DeSantis gblɔ na Fox News, esi wònɔ nu ƒom tso akɔntabubu ƒe xexlẽme si mede le dukɔa me le ƒe ma me ŋu. "Míaƒe dukɔmevi tsi kpata, eye míeva tso Democrattɔwo ƒe akpa gãtɔ me va ɖo Miliɔn 1.5".

claim: "Le Ganyawo Ƒe Akpaɖedzia Ƒe Se 2025 nu la, míena KSh415 biliɔn siwo me kpɔ medze kpɔ o la le nutome suewo, si nye KSh30 biliɔn kloe wu ƒe si va yi ƒe fetu".
evidence: Gake ele be míade ŋugble le ame siwo katã ŋlɔ agbalẽ ɖe eCitizen, si nye dziɖuɖu ƒe dɔwɔƒe si kpɔa dziɖuɖumɔnuwo dzi le mɔ̃ dzi la ŋu, eye míagate ŋu akpɔ egbɔ o. Aƒemegã Ahmed Abdullahi gblɔ be nutome sue ƒe ga si wotsɔna ɖoa dukɔa ƒe gazazã ƒe akpa aɖe la anɔ abe ƒe 10 va ɖo 13 le alafa me ene. Le August 2025 me la, Dukplɔla William Ruto va kpe Kenya ƒe nutome gã 47 siwo le Homa Bay, si didi tso Nairobi ƒe anyieheɣetoɖoƒe abe kilometa 400 ene, dzi hena ƒe sia ƒe nudzɔdzɔawo ƒe takpekpea. Le eƒe ƒe 12 lia me la, ame aɖewo gblɔna be nu siwo wotsɔna ɖoa dukɔa ƒe gawoe nye "ɣeyiɣi kple ga siwo woɖuna ɖe eŋu la ƒe tsonu".

claim: Aleema Khanum, si nye Pakistan ƒe dumevi si nɔ gaxɔ me tsã, si nye Dudzikpɔla Nyui Imran Khan, nɔvinyɔnu la yɔ Pakistan Asim Munir, si nye Pakistan Asrafowo ƒe amegã la be enye "aƒenɔla si le mɔ kpɔm na aʋawɔwɔ kple India" le nyabiase aɖe si wòdo na Sky News me.
evidence: Nyatakaka aɖe si xɔ miniti 1 kple sekɛnd 13 ye le video si me nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽŋlɔla kple nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽŋlɔla Yalda Hakim bia Imran Khan nɔvinyɔnu Aleema Khanum be, "Nu ka tae nèsusu be Pakistan yi aʋa me le May me? Nye ŋutɔ mekpɔ nu siwo dzɔ le aʋa la me. Mekpɔ mɔnukpɔkpɔ hã be maƒo nu kple Pakistan Asim Munir, si nye aʋafia, gake medi be mase nu si tae nèsusu be aʋa dzɔ le Pakistan kple India dome la gɔme. Abe ale si mese ene la, wò nyawo he dzre vɛ". Aleim Hakim gblɔ le video si me be, "Yalda Khan gblɔ be, nu ka tae wòyi aʋa me le May me ɖo? " Aleema Khan gblɔ be, "Nu sia dzɔ le May me, eye medi be yeatsɔ yeƒe subɔsubɔhawo kple subɔsubɔhawo ƒe dzre ɖo kpe edzi be yeawɔ aʋa kple India.

claim: Nyitsɔ laa la, anyigbaʋuʋu si nɔ Spain la ɖe ŋku na megalithic ŋkuɖodzikpe aɖe si xɔ ƒe 7,000, si tsi wu Egipte ƒe pyramidwo.
evidence: Le ƒe siwo va yi me la, ŋkuɖodzia dze bliboe le ƒe 2019 kple 2022 me ... ... ke hã, ŋkuɖodzia yɔ fũu le ƒe 2025 me  esime wogagblɔ nya siwo ku ɖe ŋkuɖodzia ŋu la ake  eye ŋkuɖodzia megbɔna o. ŋkuɖodzia dzɔ tso tsi si le Egipte ƒe pyramidwo kple England ƒe Stonehenge me le Spain nyitsɔ laa esime kuɖiɖia va xɔ dukɔa dzi, le nya si wogblɔ le July 2025 me la nu. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, le July 14, 2025 dzi la, woɖe ŋkuɖodzia ƒe nɔnɔmetata aɖe ɖe Facebook dzi kple numeɖeɖe didi aɖe (si woŋlɔ ɖe afi ma): Foto si woɖe la ɖe kpe gã aɖe ƒe keklẽ le ƒuta ƒe dzogoe la gbɔ le yame.

claim: U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump yɔ California Dziɖula Gavin Newsom be "Amerika Dukplɔla, Gavin Newscum".
evidence: Le March 16, 2026 dzi la, U.S. Fia Donald Trump wɔ nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽŋkekenyui aɖe le afi ma, eye wòdo vlo California Nutodziɖula Gavin Newsom, si nye nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽŋusẽfianu aɖe si ŋu wòtsi tre ɖo ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe. Le videoklipi kple nya siwo wogblɔ be woxɔ tso Trump ƒe nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe takpekpea me la, wogblɔ be yeƒo nu tso Newsom be "Dɔdukɔ ƒe dumemegã Gavin Newscum". X-nutnutnutnutzila aɖe ŋlɔ tso Trump ƒe nya si wogblɔ be yewɔ la ŋu be: "Ewɔ nuku ŋutɔ! Egbɔna ɖe megbe kabakaba wu ale si mí katã míesusui". Substack dze agbagba be: United States Nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si wogblɔ be United States Nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe dumemegã Gavin Newsom nɔ anyi ɖe United States Nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe Dzedzesi si dzi wòɖo la megbe, si ŋu woƒo nu tsoe le eƒe nyatakakawo me la, gblɔ be: "Dɔdukɔ ƒe dumemegã Gavin Newsom kpɔna ɖe ŋgɔ tẽ

claim: Le December 2025 me la, United States kple Palau de asi asi asi asi asi asi asi ɖoɖo aɖe si ana Amerika nate ŋu aɖo ame 75 siwo wometsɔ nya ɖe wo ŋu o la ɖe ƒukpo dzi.
evidence: Le December 2025 me la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe Internet dzi be ƒukpo dzi dukɔwo dometɔ ɖeka si nye Palau de asi nuwɔwɔ kple United States dzi le dɔlar miliɔn 7.5 si ana United States ƒe dziɖuɖu naxɔ ame siwo wometsɔ nya ɖe eŋu o va se ɖe 75 le Pasifik ƒukpowo dzi la me. Dɔwɔla aɖewo ɖe nya sia ɖe ɖe dzi le nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo (siwo nye agbalẽwo, agbalẽwo, agbalẽwo, agbalẽwo), kple nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo me, eye nya sia va eme le nyatakakadzraɖoƒea. Nya sia nye nyateƒe  le United States Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe dziɖuɖu ƒe dɔdeasi si ŋu wotrɔ asi ɖo vevie ta la ta, United States kple Palau de asi nuwɔwɔ kple ame siwo wometsɔ nya ɖe eŋu o ƒe dɔlar miliɔn 7.5 si ana United States ƒe dukɔ siwo wometsɔ nya ɖe eŋu o la ƒe dɔlar miliɔn 7.5 dzi be woadɔ ame siwo wometsɔ nya ɖe eŋu o la ɖe Pasifik ƒukpowo dzi, si didi tso Philippines gbɔ kilometa 500 le ɣedzeƒe, siwo dometɔ geɖe zãna le Internet dzi nyuie be wonye teƒe si woazã film le le ƒe

claim: Koklo tsiɖitsiɖi ate ŋu ada numevuvuwo kpɔ.
evidence: Togbɔ be aɖulã ƒe ʋukawo ƒe akpa gãtɔ tea ŋu daa gbe le wo ɖokui si hã la, woxlɔ̃a nu be woana atike siwo sɔ na wo nɔewo la naɖe dzesi le woƒe dzesiwo ŋu. Dɔléle gãwo, esiwo gbɔna le edzi, eye woɖea fu na wo edziedzi la biaa dɔdamɔnu tɔxɛ aɖe si ana be woana gbɔdzɔe ame siwo ƒe dzesiwo nye, be woana aɖulã ƒe ɣeyiɣi si nɔa anyi, eye be woakpe ɖe ame si le dɔ lém la ŋu. Eya ta mele be woabu aɖulã ƒe ʋukawo be wonye atike nyui aɖe si dzi woate ŋu aka ɖo na aɖulã ƒe ʋukawo zazã oa?

claim: Nigeria ƒe dugãwo me tɔwo le ablɔɖe si woxɔ me la dzi nɔ miliɔn adre.
evidence: Le ƒe 1960 me la, woɖe dziɖuɖu ƒe ɖokuisinɔnɔ le Nigeria abe dziɖula ene le se si nye 1960 ƒe Sewɔɖokplɔsea si na dziɖuɖu ƒe ɖoɖo si nye dziɖuɖua ƒe ɖoɖo, nuto etɔ̃ (Dziƒomevi, Ɣedzeƒe kple Ɣetoɖoƒe nutowo), ɖoɖo si nye nubabla si me tɔwo le le ha me (Senate kple House of Representatives) kple nutowo me (House of Assembly kple House of Chiefs) me, eye dziɖuɖu ƒe sewo ƒe ŋusẽwo le hatsotso etɔ̃ alo nu siwo nye  exclusive, concurrent kple residual me.

claim: Walgreens dze Hallmark Mahogany-kaɖitiwo, si nye gbedonameɖakaa ƒe dzesi si nye Black-viwo ɖeɖe dzaa dzra ɖo le August 2025 me alo le ƒe siwo gbɔna me la dzra gɔme.
evidence: Le nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si nye Hallmark gblɔ le nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si nye Hallmark Mahogany be Mahogany nye "kaƒodzidede si me nu gbogbo aɖewo le na Afrika-Amerika-ƒleviwo". Togbɔ be Hallmark wɔ eƒe Mahogany-ƒlegbalẽviwo na Afrika-Amerika-ƒleviwo hã la, míekpɔ kpeɖodzi aɖeke be dɔwɔƒea meɖe mɔ na ame bubuwo be woƒle wo o. Menye ɣeyiɣi si me woŋlɔ agbalẽ sia ɖo o la, ɣeyiɣi ka tututue Walgreens dze mɔ be woaxɔ Kaƒodzidedewo le woƒe nudzraɖoƒe. Nyatakaka siwo le Internet dzi le August 2025 me gblɔ be Walgreens "dze" kaƒodzidedewo dzra gɔme. Hallmark ɖo ŋkɔa le ƒe 1991 me, le eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe nu. Le August 2025 me la, nya aɖe si (si wogblɔ) ɖe Internet dzi gblɔ be Walgreens xɔ̃ɖela la dze mɔ be yeadze kaƒodzidedewo dzra gɔme na Black People le Black People ƒe ŋkɔ me ɖeɖe ko.

claim: Alakpanya: Ukraine dze agbagba be yeatsɔ ada fe na Aʋawɔwɔ Ƒe Numekukuwo Ŋuti Dɔwɔƒe la
evidence: Wotsɔ video si nɔ xɔm ɖe Internet dzi la wɔ nuŋɔŋlɔ tso video ŋutɔŋutɔ aɖe si nye Institute for the Study of War (ISW) si nye nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe asrafo ƒe aʋawɔnuwɔnawo wɔwɔ ŋu le Ukraine kple xexeame godoo ŋu la dzi, si ŋu woxɔ ŋkɔ ɖo la dzi. Russia-vi manyamanya geɖewo kaka video aɖe si wogblɔ be Institute for the Study of War wɔ tso nu si ŋu wosusui be Institute for War Study kpɔ kpɔ kpɔ le la ŋu. Woxɔe se be Ukraine-vi siwo womenya ŋkɔ o la ƒo nu kple agbalẽa le mɔ si dzi woato ana xexea me katã ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽwo o la dzi, eye wodo ga wo le $100,000 va se ɖe $500,000 la me ɖe nyatakaka siwo tsi tsitre ɖi na aʋatsonyawo le Ukraine kple xexeame katã ŋu ta. claim: Nyateƒe Ŋuti Gɔmeɖose: Nu vevi aɖe si le susu me na ame siwo gblɔna be Britain me LGBTQ+ azãɖuɖu le fe ɖem le wo si la, nye be womekpɔ ga o
evidence: Nu siwo dzi dzi woaka ɖo la mefiana le nyatakaka siwo le Internet dzi siwo gblɔna be woagblẽ ga le LGBTQ+ ƒe azãɖuɖu aɖe si wowɔna le Britain ŋu le esime dziɖula yeye aɖe va ɖo eŋu. Ian Cooper, si le Staffordshire County Council dzi le esime Reform UK ɖu dzi le dziɖuɖua ŋu le May ƒe tiatiawo me la, ʋu tab yeye aɖe, eye wògblɔ be ye metsi tre ɖe zãm le amewo si atsɔ akpe ɖe Pride wɔnawo ŋu o. Cooper gblɔ le June 3 ƒe nyabiase aɖe me be: "Menye mía kple Pride dome o, míeʋli tab yeye aɖe kple ITV Central. "Mikpɔ vivi, ɖu vivi, kpɔ dzidzɔ". Ke hã, míadi be adzɔxeɖolawo nazã ga atsɔ akpe ɖe eŋu o. Ne èdi be yeawɔ esia la, ke ɖe, yi nu me, bia nu nyuiwɔlawo, eye nàtsɔ wò asi aɖo yeƒe gaku me. "ReideA Facebook dzeɖonya aɖe dze le ŋkeke aɖewo megbe, eye wòƒo nu tso Cooper ƒe nyatakakawo ŋu, si nye: "Tsɔ nyuie, kpɔ dzidzɔ, kpɔ dzidzɔ, kpɔ dzidzɔ, kpɔ dzidzɔ". Ke hã. "

claim: Togbɔ be wogblɔ na mɔzɔla aɖe be yeakpɔ dɔ aɖeke o esi wònɔ agbagba dzem be yeadzra alɔ̃ ɖeɖeme le Internet dzi le afi si woɖua dzudzɔ le le ketekegawɔƒe Guruvayur le Kerala hã la, ekpɔe be aƒea me tɔwo katã megale o esi wòyi afi ma.
evidence: Video aɖe le kaka ɖe Internet dzi nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo dzi, eye wogblɔ be nu gbegblẽwo le edzi yim le Internet dzi le ɖoɖo si wowɔna ɖe xɔ siwo me yameʋu le ŋu la ŋu le ketekegawɔƒe Guruvayur, si le dua me le Kerala ƒe Thrissur nutome. Ame siwo zãa Internet la gblɔ be, togbɔ be wogblɔna be teƒe aɖeke meli si woana xɔ si me woazã ɖe le la o hã la, esi wòdi be yeadzra abati aɖe ɖo le Internet dzi la, ekpɔ be xɔ si me wòazã le la megale keŋkeŋ, si na amewo de dzesii be enye ameflula. claim: Woɖe Jermaine Thomas, si nye U.S. Asrafowo ƒe amegãvi si wodzi le aʋagbedzi aɖe si le Germany la, ɖe aboyo me yi Jamaica.
evidence: Le June ƒe nuwuwu lɔƒo me la, le ƒe 2025 me, esime Trump ƒe dziɖuɖu nɔ agbagba dzem be yealénɛ be woalénɛ le Amerika, ame siwo nɔ United States le mɔ manyomanyo nu la, nyatakaka siwo woɖe ɖe Internet dzi gblɔ be woɖe asrafo aɖe ƒe vi ɖe go le Jamaica, togbɔ be meyi edzi nɔ dukɔa me kpɔ o hã. Ŋutsu sia si ŋu woyɔ be Jermaine Thomas, wodzi le United States Asrafowo ƒe dɔwɔƒe aɖe le Germany, le nyatakaka siwo woɖe ɖe eme la nu. Woɖe Jermaine Thomas, si nye Amerikatɔwo ƒe asrafo ƒe vi, le Jamaica, si nye dukɔ si me wòtso le ƒe 1986 me o.

claim: Le August 2025 me la, U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump de se na ame be woatsɔ ƒe ɖeka ade ga ame siwo ado Amerika-dukplɔ̃a dzo.
evidence: Le August 25, 2025 dzi la, Trump de asi se aɖe si ƒe tanyae nye "Ame Siwo Aʋã Amerika Dzisi La Aʋã". Se sia ƒe taɖodzinue nye be ne anya wɔ la, woalé ame sia ame si woalé ɖe Amerika Dzisi la Aʋã, eye esia lɔ nu ɖe asi le asiɖeɖe le ame siwo menye Amerikatɔwo o ƒe mɔɖeɖe ŋu le ƒe 1989 me ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe nya si me ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea tso be Amedzraɖo Gbãtɔ kpɔa ʋɔɖɔa ta la dzi. Se sia mexe mɔ na ame si ado Amerika Dzisi la o. Nya si wogblɔ be Trump di be ame si ado Amerika Dzisi la ƒe ƒe ɖeka le gaxɔa me la tso nya aɖe si wògblɔ esime wòde asi se la me. Le ƒe 1989 me la, U.S.S. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ la gblɔ le Texas kple Johnson dome be Amerika Dzisi la aʋã ame si ŋu Amedzraɖo Gbãtɔ kpɔa ta la ƒe ablɔɖe ŋu. Le August 25, 2025 dzi la, Donald Trump de asi se aɖe si wòŋlɔ ɖi be "Ame si ado Amerika Dzisi la ƒe dzisi la ƒe dzisi"

claim: Aƒe xɔ asi ŋutɔ efia be míede dukɔ la me kple ame siwo tsi tre ɖe se nu miliɔn 30  eye aƒe ƒe veve hã nɔ fu ɖem na mí.
evidence: Esi míehe dukɔ la me tɔwo va tsi tsi to na ame miliɔn 30 siwo nɔ aƒe siwo wòle be woayi Amerika dukɔmeviwo si la ŋu la, nu siawo nye nyateƒe. Togbɔ be numekulawo lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be ʋuʋu ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si le dzidzim ɖe edzi la nana be aƒewo ƒe didi le dzidzim ɖe edzi hã la, kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli be aƒewo ƒe viɖe le edzi yim o. Nu vevi si ta Vance gblɔ be ʋuʋu ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si le dzidzim ɖe edzi la nye be, ʋuʋu ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si le dzidzim ɖe edzi la ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme le sesẽm ɖe edzi tso ƒe 2008 me va se ɖe ƒe ƒe 2013 me o.

claim: Wode se ɖe hadzidzi ƒe nusɔsrɔ̃wo dzi le Hamburg le Germany, elabena Moslemtɔwo gblɔna be enye nu si mele be woawɔ o.
evidence: Ðe sukudede le dukɔa me le Hamburg, Germany, ɖe se ɖe haƒoƒo ƒe nusɔsrɔ̃wo dzi be woagado vlo Moslemtɔwo siwo bua wo be wonye seɖenuwo alo 'haram' la oa? Ao, menye nyateƒee o: Hamburg ƒe dugãwo mewɔ nu ma tɔgbi o. Wodo vlo Germanygbe me nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ aɖe le nyatakaka siwo wotsɔ ɖe go le Internet dzi nyatakakawo me. Nyadzɔdzɔ sia dze le subɔsubɔhakplɔlawo kple sukuwo ƒe nuƒoƒo ɖekae si woɖona ɖe nu madzɔmadzɔ wɔwɔ kple mama ɖe ame ŋu ŋu me - si nye afɔ si subɔsubɔha me tɔwo ɖe fu na la he va. Video kpukpui si xɔ segbe 33 la dze le nyatakaka aɖe si woɖe ɖe X dzi (si woɖe ɖe mɔ̃ dzi le afi sia) me (si woɖe ɖe mɔ̃ dzi le @realMaalouf me le September 29, 2025) me.

evidence: Le December ƒe domedome 2025 me la, nya aɖe si wogblɔ be U.S. Nyuiwɔlawo ƒe Takpekpe si nɔa United States ƒe nutowo katã me la va nɔ edzi yim ŋkeke ene sɔŋ, si nye "Patriot Games", si nye kamedefefe si nɔa ɖekakpuiwo kple nyɔnuwo dome tso Amerika ƒe nutowo katã me. evidence: Wole nyatakaka aɖe si nɔ dzedzem le Internet dzi be National Investigation Agency (NIA) ɖo kpekpeɖeŋu ƒe mɔ̃ aɖe be woatsɔ anɔ nyatakakawo ɖem tso Moslemtɔwo ŋu be wowɔa dɔ siwo "tsi tre ɖe dukɔa ƒe nyonyo ŋu", siwo dome lɔlɔ̃ ƒe yiɖeme, ŋɔdzinuwo ƒe ɖoɖowo, kple gbedoxɔ tutu le, ŋu ɖe asi le, eye nyatakaka sia ɖe fia xexlẽme kple e-mail address si dzi woato aɖo nya siawo ŋu.

claim: "Nigeria ƒe asitsatsa ƒe ga home si le asiwo dzi la dzi ɖe edzi 44.3% le ƒe 2025 ƒe Q2 me va ɖo N7.46 biliɔn ($4.74 biliɔn) ..."
evidence: Dukplɔla la nɔ eƒe akɔntabubu geɖe dzi, eye eƒe nya siwo dometɔ ɖekae nye be, dzidziɖedzi ɖo ƒe etɔ̃ ƒe nuɖusi dzi le August 2025 me, dzedzeme ɖoƒewo ɖo woƒe nuwuwue tso ƒe 2019 me va se ɖe fifia, eye wogblɔ be N330 biliɔn ye wodzra ɖo na aƒemetɔwo miliɔn enyi le Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe Habɔbɔa ƒe Nu Teƒeɖoɖowo me. Gake nya aɖewo nye be woable, abe ale si wotsɔ ɣleti etɔ̃lia ƒe GDP-gɔyiyi sɔ kple ƒe xexlẽmewo ene, eye wotsɔ nuwo si menye mɔ̃memi o ƒe dɔwo katã sɔ kple esiwo womedzra ɖo o ene. Tinubu ƒe nya siwo nye be eƒe dziɖuɖu ƒe viɖe le Nigeria ƒe ganyawo me tso ƒe 97% va ɖo ƒe alafa memama etɔ̃lia me la mede 50 o. Míekpɔ kpeɖodzi aɖeke hã o be eƒe nya si wògblɔ be dɔwɔlawo 153,000 kpɔ viɖe tso gaɖoɖo si nye N30 biliɔn ƒe ɖoɖo aɖe me o la hã nye nyateƒe.

claim: Ame siwo ade Amerika ƒe alafa memama etɔ̃ koe wɔa dɔ le agble me.
evidence: Nya si wogblɔ: Ame sia ame ƒe akpa etɔ̃ kloe le Amerika le agble me. Nya si wogblɔe nye esi wode asi numedzodzro aɖe le gaƒoƒo 24 ƒe gbedeasi si nye Plus si Ghana dziɖuɖu gblɔ be ana agble kple dɔ si woɖuna la nava zu nu yeye. "Ne èyi dukɔ deŋgɔwo me abe Amerika ene la, woƒe akpa etɔ̃ pɛ ko le agble me. Gake woɖea nu geɖe, eye woƒe agbɔsɔsɔ hã to vovo. "Ke ne èva míaƒe dukɔa ƒe akpa aɖe la, ame geɖe le agble me eye míeɖea nu si megali o ... elabena agbledelawo gale nu siwo me tsi le ƒea katã me, eye womekpɔa kpekpeɖeŋu aɖeke le agbleawo me o ta.

claim: Míetsɔ $60- miliɔn ƒe nunanae na Gaza kwasiɖa eve siwo va yi be woatsɔ ana nuɖuɖu Gaza.
evidence: Esi wobiana be nuɖuɖudzɔmegblẽ le Gaza ŋu le afi ma la, Donald Trump gblɔ be: "Miawo ŋutɔ mienyae be, míetsɔ dɔ miliɔn geɖe ɖo kpekpeɖeŋunana. " U.S. State Department gblɔ le July 2 ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ aɖe me be, míetsɔ dɔ miliɔn 60 na amewo, eye ame aɖeke mekpɔe dze sii gɔ̃ hã o, be dɔ wònye na nuɖuɖu o", eye wògblɔ le July 27 lia dzi le Turnberry, Scotland. Trump gbugbɔ gblɔ be, "Míetsɔ dɔ miliɔn 60 ɖo nuɖuɖu me, ga geɖe. Esia ate ŋu akpɔ ame dzi hena ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe, eye míedi be míakpɔ egbɔ be míetsɔ dɔ sia ɖe eme nyuie". U.S. State Department gblɔ le July 2 lia dzi be, wona dɔ miliɔn 30 ƒe nunanae le June me na United States kple Israel ƒe alɔdeƒonuwɔna aɖe si le Gaza; emegbe la, eɖe gbeƒã be, tso July 26 lia dzi la, womexe ga ma ɖe mɔ̃ o.

claim: Ɣeaɖeɣi la, Amerika Dukplɔla Donald Trump ɖe gbeƒã Dadaaŋkeke dzi gbedasia si dze egɔme be, "Dadaŋkeke nyui na AME sia AME, vevietɔ Dadaawo, Srɔ̃wo kple Amedzrowo, si nye Radical Left Fascists, Marxists, kple Kɔmiunist siwo le agbagba dzem be yewoatsrɔ̃ míaƒe Dukɔ gã si va yi la".
evidence: Le May 2026 me la, ame siwo zãa Internet dzi hahoowo la ɖe foto aɖe si woxɔe se be eyae nye Truth Social si dzi United States Dukplɔla Donald Trump do gbe kpɔ le ku ɖe Dadaa Ŋkekea ŋu la ɖe go. Snopes-tɔ aɖe ɖo foto sia na mí eye wòbia be, "Ðe esia nye nyateƒe?" (@realDonaldTrump/Truth Social) Trump gblɔ be eɖo nyatakaka sia ɖe: "Mía Dadaa Ŋkeke la na ame sia ame, vevietɔ Dadaa, Srɔ̃wo kple Amedzro Siwo Nye Asivi Ðuwo Ƒe Dadawo, Marxistwo, kple Kɔmiunistwo, siwo le agbagba dzem be yewoatsrɔ̃ kple tsrɔ̃ Míaƒe Dukɔ si nye gã tsã la.

claim: Frontline Magazine ƒe takpegbalẽa gblɔ be Vijay Wave ava Tamil Nadu hafi woaɖo to.
evidence: Nu si wogblɔ be Frontline gblɔ be "Vijay wave" aɖe adzɔ le Tamil Nadu hafi woaɖo to le dukɔa me nye aʋatsonya. Wode dzesi nuwɔwɔ si nye be, ame si va zu dunyahela, C. Joseph Vijay, si nye Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) ƒe nuɖoametɔ, la le ame aɖe si le nu ƒom le eŋu abe ame vevi aɖe si anɔ ŋgɔ na takpekpe si le edzi yim la me ene. Le Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (DMK) si le dzi ɖum kple dutoƒonuɖoanyi si nye dutoƒonuɖoanyi Anna Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (AIADMK) si le tsitre ɖi na dukɔa me la dome la, TVK nye ame yeye aɖe si va dze ŋgɔ na dunyahehea le dukɔa me. Wode ɖoɖo be yeado go le April 23, eye ame siwo le xexlẽm le May 4 lia dzi. Nyagblɔɖi: Nuwɔwɔ si nye be, "Vijay wave" aɖe le X kple Facebook dzi va se ɖe esime woaɖo to Tamil Nadu dziɖuɖua. Nyagblɔɖi la nye be, "Vijay wave" aɖe le edzi yim.

claim: Drifter aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Ronald McDonald wu ɖevi 12 le nutome gãwo ƒe fiasewo dzi le Amerika ƒe Titinaɣetoɖoƒe le ƒe 1892 me eye wòde dzi ƒo na egbegbe McDonald ƒe nuɖuɖu kpekpeme kadodo si ƒe ŋkɔwo nye ema.
evidence: Le kpɔɖeŋu me, le August 11, ƒe ŋkeke si dzi woxɔ ŋkɔ le la, ame aɖe si nye Inspector Story ƒe Instagram axa dzi kpɔ video aɖe si xɔ asi wu miliɔn 10 eye wòda ŋkɔ si nye, "Esiae nye Ronald McDonald vavã la". Klip la ɖe text ƒe ŋkɔ si nye, "Nyateƒea ƒe Ronald McDonald menye burger dzralae o. Ele ɖeviwo dim. Esiae nye nuvlowɔwɔ vavã si le McDonald ƒe fast-food-ha si nye  ɖevi wuieve siwo dzo do ŋgɔ na ƒe dzomeŋɔli 1892 la ƒe anyinɔnɔ me".

claim: Dziɖuɖua dze nudzɔdzɔ aɖe gɔme be yeakplɔ Rupee miliɔn enyi akpe ɖe Nimisha Priya ŋu.
evidence: Esi woɖe kufia na Indiatɔwo ƒe dɔnɔdzikpɔlaa Nimisha Priya le Yemen-vi Talal Abdo ƒe ku me megbe la, Internet-habɔbɔbɔdzikpɔlawo le nyatakaka aɖe hem henɔ nu siwo woana le woƒe "Save Nimisha Priya" ƒe ʋunyaʋunya me la biam. Wogblɔna be woate ŋu atsɔ ga si wotsɔ na Nimisha Priya la ayi tẽ ɖe India-dziɖuɖua ƒe nyatakaka si dziɖuɖua ɖo la dzi. Wodoa gbe be woana ta si dɔlarɔ si ŋu wogblɔna be eyae nye Rs 8.3 crore to aʋunyaʋunya sia dzi. Vishvas News kpɔe le eƒe nyatakaka si wòdo me be enye aʋatsonya. India-dziɖuɖua meƒo nu tso ame aɖeke ŋu be wòana kpekpeɖeŋu le Nha Nimisha Priya ƒe numekuku si wowɔna la me o, eye womeɖe mɔ na dziɖuɖu ƒe nyatakaka siawo hã be woana kpekpeɖeŋu tso eya ŋutɔ gbɔ o.

claim: Hadzidziwɔla kple haƒola Josh Groban do go U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump le esi wòbia tso eƒe ha aɖe si be woana woadzi ha xɔŋkɔ si nye "You Raise Me Up.
evidence: Nyaʋunya aɖe si kaka ɖe Internet dzi le November 2025 me gblɔ be haƒola kple haƒola Josh Groban do go U.S. Nyui Donald Trump le esi wòbia tso ha aɖe si be woana woadzi ha xɔŋkɔ "You Raise Me Up". Groban ƒo nu tso ha sia ŋu le ƒe 2003 me. Ireland-Norway hahaa Secret Garden ŋlɔ nyaʋunya sia eye wòɖe "You Raise Me Up" le ƒe 2001 me. Nyaʋunya sia ƒe kpɔɖeŋue nye be, le November 1 dzi la, ame aɖe si le Graceful Melodies ƒe Facebook axa dzi la ɖe foto aɖe si ɖe Groban ƒe foto aɖe ɖe Trump ƒe foto aɖe ŋu la ɖe go. Nyaʋunyaa dze egɔme be, "Ɣeyiɣi si Donald Troban fia haƒola aɖe eye wògblɔ be, 'Play You Raise Me Up,' e nye xoxo. Ɣeaɖeɣi la, Josh nɔ agbe ɖo tom, eye zi sia la, megale nu ɖum o". Nyaʋunya sia dze le afi aɖe. Nyaʋunyaʋunya aɖe si dze le míaƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si nye "Facebook Melodies". hã dze ŋgɔ na nyaʋunyaʋunyaʋunya siawo.

claim: Aʋafia Aʋafia A.P. Singh ƒo nu tso ale si wòxlɔ̃ nu le Tejas-ʋɔdziʋuawo ŋu na dziɖuɖua ŋu eye wògblɔ be woaɖo IAF-ʋawulawo ɖe Pakistan be woafia hehe wo.
evidence: Video si me wòɖe nu me le be yexlɔ̃ nu India dzi be wòagaɖo Tejas-ʋufɔʋua ɖe India ƒe Aʋawua me o la le dzodzom abe nu ŋutɔŋutɔ ene. Le videoa me la, Singh tsɔ Tejas-ʋufɔʋua, si nye India ƒe anyigba dzi yameʋua (LCA) la sɔ kple Indiatɔwo ƒe nuɖuɖu si woyɔna be samosa le eƒe nɔnɔme ta. BOOM kpɔe be wozãa AI-tekununya tsɔ wɔ video la me dɔ. Video sia kple Singh ƒe nya si nye alakpatɔe si me wòkafu Pakistan Aʋawua me (PAF) la do go le Tejas-ʋufɔʋua dze anyi le Dubai Aʋawuaƒewɔƒe le November 21, 2025 dzi. Womu Namansh Syal, si nye aʋakɔ ƒe aʋafia la le afɔkua me.

claim: Shah Rukh Khan gblɔ be Mustafizur Rahman awɔ KKR-ha la togbɔ be amewo tsi tre ɖe eŋu eye wòka mo na dɔwɔla Gautam Adani hã.
evidence: Le videoa ƒe akpa aɖe si nɔ ta kekem le Internet dzi la, wogblɔna be ele be Shah Rukh Khan nafia be Bollywood-vi kple Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) ƒe nuƒola Shah Rukh Khan le Bangladesh-tɔ aɖe si nye Mustafizur Rahman ƒe gome le KKR me la ta ʋlim, eye wòka mo na dɔwɔla Gautam Adani kple "Hindu-Muslim dunyahehe". Le videoa ƒe akpa aɖe la, wogblɔna be ele be Shah Rukh Khan nafia be ele be ame siwo tsia tre ɖe Mustafizur Rahman ŋu la "nudzɔ nuƒoƒo", eye wòda vo ɖe Adani be yeatsɔ elektrikŋusẽ ana Bangladesh, eye wòdo ŋusẽe be Mustafizur "ade asi KKR dzi".

claim: Ame geɖe wu Amerikatɔwo ku le Chicago le kwasiɖa ene me le March 2026 me wu amesiwo ku le aʋa me tso esime United States-Israel-ʋa si dze egɔme le Iran la dze egɔme.
evidence: Le March 2026 ƒe nuwuwu la, nya aɖe si kaka ɖe Internet dzi be ame geɖe wu Amerikatɔwo ku le Chicago le kwasiɖa ene siwo do ŋgɔ na nya si wogblɔ la kaka me wu ame siwo ku le aʋa si wowɔ le Israel kple Amerika dome ɖe Iran ŋu la. Ʋuʋua dze egɔme le February ƒe nuwuwu eye wole dzudzɔ wɔm le ɣeyiɣi sia me. Amewo ƒe nyatakakawo le Internet dzi le X (si woŋlɔ nu ɖo) kple Facebook (si woŋlɔ nu ɖo), togbɔ be edze abe Erick Eson si gblɔ be yenye "nyateƒeagblɔla" ene la gbɔe wòtso ene. "Kristotɔwo ƒe haƒola" la ɖe video aɖe ɖe Instagram (si woŋlɔ nu ɖo) le March 25 dzi, si me wòde dzesii be nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ɖe nu siwo me afɔku le le U.S. asrafowo ŋu le la dzi ɖe edzi le ɣeyiɣi si me wòŋlɔ nu ɖo la me.

claim: India-ʋakɔ ƒe amegã, Aʋafia Upendra Dwivedi lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yameʋuwo ƒe akpa ade bu, eye asrafo 250 wu woƒe agbe le aʋa si dzɔ nyitsɔ laa kple Pakistan me.
evidence: Video aɖe si gblɔ be yeakpɔ Asrafowo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔhaa ƒe amegã, Aʋafia Upendra Dwivedi, le India ƒe dzodzodzoe ade siwo bu, eye asrafo 250 hã ku le May 2025 me aʋa si wowɔ kple Pakistan me la va zu viral le Internet dzi. Wose video sia me be Aʋafia Dwivedi gblɔ be "...aʋawɔwɔ si gbɔna si míele ŋku lém ɖe eŋu la ate ŋu adzɔ kpuie eye ele be míaɖi ƒo ɖe eŋu...Aʋawɔwɔ sia si meʋã ŋu o la, ele be míawɔ ɖeka. Míeɖe dzodzodzoe ade kple asrafo 250 sɔŋ gake míadzudzɔ gbeɖe o. Míasrɔ̃e. Míekpɔe. Míeɖe nya aɖewo ɖi. Eya ta aleke esia dzɔe??..." Nyatakpɔla kpɔ video la ɖa eye wòkpɔe be ele be woɖɔe ɖo. X-dzikpɔlawo ƒe asiwo, siwo le Pakistan, siwo dome nyatakakawo le, ate ŋu adzɔ kpuie eye woŋlɔ ɖe afi sia be, "Le dzodzodzoe le dzodzoe me kple asrafo 250 kple dzodzoe le Pakistan, eye míedzudzɔ aʋawɔwɔ le Pakistan, gake míedzudzɔna gbeɖe o".

evidence: Le September ƒe gɔmedzedze la, nya aɖe si wogblɔ le Internet dzi be United States Dukplɔla Ðeka J.D. Vance gblɔ na Fox News be ele be woawɔ Labor Day dzi ɖuɖu abe "nyɔnu siwo le dɔ lém" ene. " Nyati aɖe si dze le Threads dzi (si woŋlɔ ɖe eƒe gadzraɖoƒe) ɖe nyatakaka aɖe dzi gblɔ be: WASHINGTON-JD Vance ʋã nyahehe le Dzoɖagbe dzi esi wògblɔ be Labor Day nanye "nyɔnu siwo le dɔ lém" ɖuɖu. "The mob woke has distorted the true meaning of Labor Day", Vance told Fox News "Honoring workers may please people who work for a living, but it doesn't delight me and Donald Trump". Vance urged that Labor Day be be be "a time to pay tribute to the one thing that gives women's lives meaning: reproducing". "No women who have given the user the Labor Day picnics should be allowed", he declared. "No baby_girls, no_bad_dogs, no_bad_dogs, no_bad_dogs" caption added to the final user's section.

claim: Le ƒe 2013 me la, Donald Trump, si nye dɔwɔhati ɣemaɣi kple ame si wɔa television dzi wɔnawo la gblɔ be: "Dunya ƒe ɖoɖo si dzi woatso la dze le ŋgɔnɔla ƒe ŋgɔdonya manyomanyo ta. Mefia be kuxiwo dzea egɔme tso dziƒoe eye ele be woado wo ɖa tso dziƒoe.
evidence: Le ɣeyiɣi si me United States dziɖuɖu ƒe nuxexlẽa dze egɔme le October 1, 2025 dzi la, nya aɖe si kaka ɖe Internet dzi be le ƒe 2013 me la, ɣemaɣi la, dɔwɔla kple ame si kpɔa television dzi la gblɔ be: "Dunya ƒe nuxexlẽa dze le ŋgɔnɔla ƒe ŋgɔdonya ƒe ku ta. Megale gbɔgblɔm be kuxiwo dzea egɔme tso dziƒoe eye ele be woatu wo ɖo tso dziƒoe. Nuxexlẽa fia be ŋgɔnɔla la gbɔdzɔ". Le memes kple memes siwo me woɖe nya sia ɖo me la, Trump, ame si lɔ̃ ɖe edzi le ƒe 2025 me la, do go nya siawo ŋkeke aɖewo do ŋgɔ na dziɖuɖu ƒe nuxexlẽa le esime ɣemaɣi la, Barack Obama nɔ dzi ɖum le ƒe 2013 me.

Le eƒe ƒe 12 lia me la, ame aɖewo gblɔna be nu siwo wotsɔna ɖoa dukɔa ƒe gawoe nye "ɣeyiɣi kple ga siwo woɖuna ɖe eŋu la ƒe tsonu".

claim: House Republican Nyatakakahaŋusẽtɔ, Newt Gingrich, si nye nɔviawo ƒe ha la ƒe ŋgɔnɔla tsã la gblɔ be yeatsɔ nuklia ƒe dzudzɔwo awɔ ɖoɖo ɖe mɔ si ana be tɔdziʋu si ayi Hormuz-tɔsisia ƒe mɔ si nye mɔ bubu la ŋu.
evidence: Le March 2026 me la, Republican House Speaker Newt Gingrich dze agbagba be yeatsɔ nukliaŋusẽwo awɔ dɔ atsɔ atu mɔ yeye si woatsɔ atrɔ asi le Iran-dziɖula ƒe Hormuz-ʋe me ŋu.Gingrich ƒe nyatakaka si wogblɔ be X ye ɖe nu siawo me la ƒe fotowo kaka ɖe Internet dzi. Nyatakaka si le Gingrich ƒe nyatakaka si dze le X ŋu la nye nyateƒe; eya ta míeka ɖe edzi be nya sia nye nyateƒe. Gake nyati si wòde la nye nya si meɖɔa ŋu ɖo, eye womenyae nyuie be ele nya sia me tom o. Míedze agbagba be míasrɔ̃ nu geɖe tso Gingrich ŋu eye míagbugbɔ ŋku aɖo eƒe nyatakaka sia dzi. Le March 15 lia dzi la, Gingrich ƒe nyatakaka si wogblɔ be X ye ɖe nu siawo me la ɖe eme nyuie wu ale si dze le Internet dzi.

evidence: Le December 2025 me la, nya aɖe si kaka ɖe Internet dzi be Georgia ƒe Fulton County dziɖuɖua ƒe ame siwo kpɔa gome le nyatiawo me la lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yewoxɔa ame siwo do ŋgɔ na yewo dzi le nyatia me, evɔ womeléa ŋku ɖe wo ŋu nyuie le United States ƒe 2020 ƒe US Dukplɔ̃ɖedzigbe ƒe tiatiawɔƒea, si me Democrat Joe Biden tsi tre ɖe Republican Donald Trump ŋu la dzi o. Ame aɖewo gblɔ be nu si wowɔ le nuŋɔŋlɔgbalẽa me la na "amebeble" va nɔ eme vam le ema ta. Le Fulton County ƒe Nyatiawɔɣi la, Biden xɔ ame 381,144 ƒe xexlẽme, alo ame siwo katã xɔe la ƒe 72%, va ɖo ame 137,240 le ame 524, si nye ame siwo do ŋgɔ na ye la dzi.

claim: Ame siwo ƒe ŋkɔ nye gbɔdɔdɔdɔwɔla Jeffrey Epstein gblɔ le e-mail siwo me wòŋlɔ ɖo la me be etsɔ atike na Bill Gates, si nye Microsoft ƒe dɔwɔhaɖowɔla, tsɔ kpɔ gbɔdɔdɔdɔdɔ ƒe dɔléle aɖe gbɔ be "wòakpɔ gbɔdɔdɔ kple Russia nyɔnuviwo ƒe emetsonuwo gbɔ".
evidence: Nyagblɔla aɖe gblɔ be nya siwo wogblɔ la nye "gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔwo kple aʋatsoɖenuwo". Nya siwo wogblɔna be Microsoft nuɖoanyiŋusẽkpɔɖeamedziŋusẽdɔ Bill Gates ƒe ŋkɔ le nyatakaka yeye siwo ku ɖe ganyawo ƒe ganyawo ƒe ganyawo ƒe ganyawo ŋu la dometɔ ɖeka me la nɔ United States Dwumegãwo ƒe nyatakaka siwo wota ɖe Internet dzi le January kple February ƒe gɔmedzedze me la dome. Nya siwo wogblɔna le January kple February ƒe gɔmedzedze me la kaka ɖe Internet dzi le ɣeyiɣi si me U.S. Department of Justice ɖe nyatakaka miliɔn geɖe siwo ku ɖe Epstein ƒe gbɔdɔdɔ ŋuti dɔdrɔ̃ ŋuti numekuku ŋu la ŋu. Facebook (si woŋlɔ nu ɖe eŋu) kple Instagram (si woŋlɔ nu ɖe eŋu) ƒe nyatakaka siwo wogblɔna be Bill Gates ƒe ŋkɔ le nyatakaka yeye aɖe si ku ɖe ganyawo ƒe ganyawo ŋu la me.

claim: Australia ƒe kapten tsã Ricky Ponting yɔ India be enye ame si tsi nu le eƒe nuxaxa ta le esi wògbe asiɖeɖe le Pakistan ŋu le Asia-ƒodzidzelawo ƒe futɔwo megbe ta.
evidence: Asitsala Surya Kumar Yadav va do dziku le esi wòdo asi ɖa kple Pakistan-tɔa le Asia-ƒome ƒe ku megbe le Dubai International Stadium me le Kwasiɖagbe si va yi me. Azɔ hã, nya aɖe si wogblɔ tso Yadav ƒe nuwɔna ŋu, si ŋu woda asi ɖo na Australia-tɔ aɖe si nye crickettɔ Ricky Ponting la, le kaka tsam le Internet dzi nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Wogblɔ na Sky Sports be Ponting gblɔ be, "Woŋlɔa aʋa sia ɖi tegbee kple India be enye nugblẽtɔ gã. Ale si Pakistan-tɔa di be yeado asi ɖa le nuwuwu la wɔe be wozu domenyilawo le Aƒetɔ ƒe fefe la me, eye Indiae nye nugblẽtɔ si nɔa anyi ɖaa". India Today ƒe boblododoa ɖee fia be nya si wogblɔ la nye aʋatsokaka.

claim: Nufiafiadɔ ƒe nunɔamesiwo ŋuti nyatakaka si le nufiafiadɔ ƒe ɖoɖowɔɖi ŋuti nyatakakawo dzi la
evidence: Wotsɔ nya si wogblɔ be Malaygbe me nuŋlɔɖi aɖe si ƒe tanyae nye "Media nyatakaka: Malaysia Srɔ̃ɖigbalẽ (SPM) ƒe ŋuɖoɖowo" la de Facebook le April 1 lia dzi. Eɖe Malaysia ƒe aʋawɔnu si dze le afi ma, eye edze abe Srɔ̃subɔdɔwɔƒe la ye ɖe asi le eŋu ene, eye wòɖe dzesi le ale si ame siwo wu katã va ɖo SPM ƒe dodokpɔa me - si nye sukudedehaxɔmenɔla siwo dzona le sekɛndare-suku me - la ƒe ŋuti le hatsotsoa nu. Nya si wogblɔ le nyatakaka sia me be Malaytɔ 31.43 le alafa me, Chinatɔ 88.21 le alafa me kple Indiatɔ 81.48 le alafa me la xɔ dzesi kɔkɔwo. Facebook nyatakaka si woɖe le April 2 lia dzi kple X dzĩ si wotsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la ƒe nɔnɔmetata.

evidence: Video si tso Hindi nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe TV9 Bharatvarsh si gblɔ be, "Delhi me nɔla ƒe ku: Ŋutsu aɖe dɔ alɔ̃ le nyɔnu ƒe kukua gblẽm ɖi le ʋua me" la le kaka ɖe Internet dzi (ele afi sia, le afi sia, kple afi sia). claim: Dukɔ bliboa me Dukɔ Ƒe Lok Adalat si woɖo be woaɖo le December 13, 2025 dzi la ana nàkpɔ viɖe gãwo le ʋukuku sesẽwo ŋu.
evidence: Nyatakaka geɖe siwo le eme le social media dzi (le afi sia, le afi sia) le ta kekem, eye wogblɔna be dukɔa me katã ƒe National Lok Adalat le December 13, 2025 dzi la ana mɔɖelawo akpɔ mɔnukpɔkpɔ gã aɖe be woaɖɔ mɔzɔlawo ƒe ʋukulawo ƒe ʋuwo ƒe ʋuwo ƒe kuxiwo ɖo le mɔzɔzɔ̃ si le lalam la me, eye woaɖe asi le wo ŋu le woƒe dɔwɔnawo ŋu le agbɔsɔsɔ si anɔ abe 50% va se ɖe 100% ene, le dukɔ si me wole la nu. Nyatakaka siwo wogblɔ be woalé wo ɖe emee nye Delhi, Haryana, Punjab, Maharashtra, Uttar Pradesh, Gujarat, Tamil Nadu, Telangana, Karnataka, Rajasthan kple West Bengal. Nyatakaka vovovo siwo dze le dukɔa me kple nyakakakaƒenɔla geɖewo hã gblɔe nenema (le December 13, 2025 dzi). Le nyati sia dzi la, mina míadzro nya si wogblɔ le nya siawo me la me kpɔ. Míate ŋu akpɔ nya sia ƒe asinu siwo le afi sia me la ƒe gɔmeɖeɖe si le afi sia me. Nya si wogblɔ be: Dukɔƒome bliboa ƒe tok

claim: Moslem ŋutsu aɖe dze nyɔnu aɖe dzi le India ƒe restoran aɖe me
evidence: Video aɖe si ɖe ŋutsu aɖe si nɔ nu ƒom na nyɔnu aɖe hafi woƒoe le nu si dze abe amedzrodzeƒe ene la le kaka ɖe Internet dzi. Wotsɔ nya ɖe video sia me be Moslem ŋutsu aɖe kplɔ nyɔnu aɖe yi ɖadi nuɖuɖudzraƒe, dze eŋu esi wògbe be yeakplɔe ayi amedzrodzeƒe aɖe, eye emegbe esi kpovitɔwo va la, wòʋli eɖokui ta. Facebook-nutnutnutnutɔ aɖe ɖe video si nɔ kaka ɖe afi ma la dzi kple nya si gbɔna: "Dza le zã me, eye tsi le Dhaka me, si fia be amedzrodzeƒe aɖe anɔ edzi yim la, nyɔnuvi la gblɔ be etsɔe Jihadi dze edzi. Nyɔnuvi la ŋutɔ tsi ta le eɖokui si eye nyɔnuvi si va be yeaɖe Dhaka me la va tsi ta, eye wòyi kpovitɔwo gbɔ be yewoawui. Eya ta ele be ame siwo nɔ video sia lém la naɖe mɔ na wo.

claim: Amerika Dukplɔla Donald Trump gblɔ be Washington, D.C. kpovitɔwo "le tsitre ɖe afi ma, eye amewo le ɖiƒom ɖe wo ŋkume, eye womeɖe mɔ na wo be woawɔ naneke o. Gake fifia la, woɖe mɔ na wo be woawɔ nu si tututu wodi".
evidence: Le August 11, 2025 dzi la, U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ɖe gbeƒã "nu vlo wɔwɔ ƒe nuwɔwɔ si hiã kpata" le Washington, D.C., eye wòde asi Asrafowo ƒe Kpovitɔwo me. Esi wòyɔ nɔnɔme si le dugã la me be "nu vlo wɔwɔ blibo kple seɖivɔ̃ɖi" la, wogblɔ le videoklipu aɖewo nu be Trump gblɔ be "woana mɔ kpovitɔwo nawɔ nu si dze wo ŋu" le nu vlo wɔwɔ ƒe nya ŋu. Wogblɔ be Trump gblɔ be kpovitɔwo "le tsitre ɖe afi ma, eye amewo le tsi tsom ɖe wo ŋkume, eye womeɖe mɔ na wo be woawɔ nu si dze wo ŋu o. Gake fifia la, woɖe mɔ na wo be woawɔ nu si dze wo ŋu o". Le nyateƒe me la, Trump gblɔ nya si dze le afisia le eƒe nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽŋkeke si dzi wòɖe gbeƒã "nu vlo wɔwɔ ƒe nuwɔametɔ" le D.C. Abe ale si wòdze le nyatakaka siawo me ene la, míebua esia be enye nu si ŋu woato. Gake esi wòɖe gbeƒãe la, eɖe mɔ be yeatsɔ Columbia D.C. Se 740 ƒe

claim: CRPF do ŋusẽ eƒe asrafodɔ si wowɔna do ŋgɔ na West Bengal ƒe tiatiawɔɣi.
evidence: Video si le kaka ɖe edzi be CRPF ƒe dzidzenu sesẽwo le ŋgɔ na West Bengal ƒe tiatiawo menye tso Bengal o, ke boŋ tso gbeadzisubɔsubɔdɔa si wowɔ le Bangladesh le sukuviŋusẽtɔ Osman Hadi ƒe ku megbe la me. New Delhi (Vishvas News). West Bengal awɔ ɖoɖo na takpekpewɔɣiwo le April 23 kple 29, 2026, eye woaɖe gbeƒãe le May 4 lia dzi.

claim: Le June 2025 me la, anyiehe-aʋegbeʋeʋẽwo nu va yi le esi wotsrɔ̃e zi mamlɛtɔ megbe.
evidence: Le ƒe 2018 me la, ŋutsuvi mamlɛtɔ si nye dziehe ɣiʋuwo ku le dzedzeme le Kenya. Vidzidziwo kpɔ mɔ wɔ dɔ ɖe dziehe ɣiʋuwo ƒe vidzidzi 35 dzi, eye woxɔe se be woxɔe le dziehe ɣiʋuwo ƒe vidzidzi me, siwo nye vidzĩ siwo nye woƒe ƒometɔ kplikplikpli wu le dziehe ɣiʋuwo ƒe vidzidzi me. Gake ele be woakpɔ egbɔ be woƒe vidzidzi va yi nyuie. Le June 2025 me la, wogblɔ be "nu si nye dziehe ɣiʋuwo ƒe vidzidzi" la va nɔ anyi le Facebook dzi eye wogblɔ be "nu si nye ɣiʋuwo ƒe vidzidzi" la "meva dzɔ o".

claim: Le United Kingdom la, eva hiã be lãwo ƒe lãkpɔ aɖe naɖe asi le Afrika ƒe papagai ɣi atɔ̃ aɖewo ŋu le esi xeawo nɔ ɣli dom be yewoado vlo amedzrowo kple dɔwɔlawo ta.
evidence: Le April 2026 me la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe Internet dzi be le United Kingdom la, lãkpɔkpɔ aɖe va de asi ƒuƒoƒo si me Afrika-dukɔ ƒe papagai atɔ̃ le esi xewo do ɣli ɖe amedzrowo kple dɔwɔlawo ta la me, elabena woƒo ɖi wo nɔewo. Facebook axa aɖe ɖe nya si wogblɔ la ɖe afi ma kpe ɖe papagai atɔ̃ ƒe nɔnɔmetata aɖe ŋu, eye woŋlɔ nya si nye, "Wodo fiƒode ɖe amedzro siwo katã va to afi ma la dzi, woɖu fewu le eŋu ɖekae, eye papagai 200 bubuwo hã va nya nu tso eŋu". Nya si wogblɔ hã kaka ɖe Instagram (si woŋlɔ ɖe afi ma) kple Instagram (si woŋlɔ ɖe afi ma). Nya si wogblɔ le afi ma gblɔ be lãawo le Lincolnshire Wildlife Park, si le Friskney, Lincolnshire me.

evidence: Le Zohran Mamdani ƒe ƒe ƒe 2025 ƒe ʋunyaʋunya si nye be wòaxɔ du gãtɔ kekeake si le Amerika dzi la dzi wɔwɔ me la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe Internet dzi be du si wotia la do ŋugbe be yeade asi Israel ƒe Dudzikpɔla Gã Benjamin Netanyahu ƒe ʋunyaʋunya me ne eva yi New York City. Mamdani, si nye demokrata nyadzɔdzɔgblɔla kple Palestina-hadzikpɔla si lɔ̃a nuwɔwɔ tso Palestina ŋu la gblɔ zi geɖe le videowo me be yeadze agbagba be yeade bubu Dudzikpɔha Aɖe ƒe ʋunyaʋunya ŋu le New York City ƒe nya me ne dudzikpɔla gã la dze mɔ ayi ICC.

claim: Manipulation: Czech Dukplɔla Petr Pavel De Dzi Ƒo Le Ukraine Ƒe Anyigba Siwo Dzi Wodzudzɔ Aʋawɔwɔ Le La Ŋu
evidence: Nya si wògblɔ be Czech-dukplɔla Petr Pavel le nu ƒom na Ukraine be wòalɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yeakpɔtɔ aɖu yeƒe anyigbadzidukɔwo dzi o eye ele be yealɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yeakpɔtɔ anɔ anyi ɖaa la dzi. Petro Pavel te gbe ɖe edzi be Ɣetoɖoƒe la mekpɔ ŋudzedze ɖe anyigbadzidukɔwo ŋu na Russia o eye wòka ɖe edzi be ele be Ukraine nakpɔtɔ anɔ ye ɖokui si, ke menye be yealɔ̃ ɖe asiɖeɖe alo anyigba dziɖeɖe dzi o. Nyatakakawo ƒe nyatakakawo zã Czech-dukplɔla Petr Pavel ƒe nyabiase aɖe na BBC tsɔ trɔa eƒe nyawo me, eye wògblɔ be kplɔla sia hã lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be Ukraine mate ŋu aɖe eƒe anyigbadzidukɔwo dzi akpɔtɔ o eye ele be yealɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yeakpɔtɔ anɔ agbe. claim: Fransegbe magazine aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Charlie Hebdo ƒe nu vɔ̃ gã si me womate ŋu atsɔ ake o si nye be eƒo ɖi Nyagblɔɖila la ƒe ŋkume la ɖe ale si gbegbe dunyahehe kple dekɔnuwo ƒe habɔbɔ siwo le Ɣetoɖoƒe la léa fu Islam kple Moslemtɔwo ƒe habɔbɔa la fia la fia.
evidence: Nyabiase sia ƒe dzedzeme nɔ kɔkɔm ŋutɔ, gake eva xɔ tohehe tso Moslem ƒuƒoƒo geɖe gbɔ. France ƒe ɣemaɣi dziɖuɖua ƒe ŋgɔnɔla Jacques Chirac ɖe gbeƒã le ɣeyiɣi ma dzi be, Ele be woatsri nu sia nu si ate ŋu agblẽ nu le ame bubu ƒe dzixɔsewo ŋu, vevietɔ subɔsubɔ dzixɔsewo ŋu. Ele be woaɖe susu ƒe ablɔɖe dzi le agbanɔamedzi ƒe gbɔgbɔ me. Charlie Hebdo ɖo nya ŋu nɛ to agbalẽ si agbalẽŋlɔla kple agbalẽnyala 12 siwo dome Salman Rushdie kple Ayaan Hirsi Ali le la te ɖi la me, si me woŋlɔ ɖe akpa aɖe be, Mía, agbalẽŋlɔlawo, nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo, agbalẽnyalawo, míeyia be míatsi tsitre ɖe subɔsubɔhawo ƒe dziɖuɖuwo ŋu eye míado ŋusẽ ablɔɖe, mɔnukpɔkpɔ sɔgbɔsɔsrɔ̃ kple xexemeŋusẽwo na ame sia ame. Le ƒe si kplɔe ɖo me la, Franseawo ƒe Mosque de Paris kple United of Islamic Organizations si le France tsɔtsrɔ̃e ɖe Charlie Hebdo ŋu be wòagbu tata na Danemark ƒe filmwo.

claim: Houston ƒe vidzĩdɔwɔƒe aɖe gbe dɔdzikpɔla Christina Propst le esi wòda nyatakaka ɖe Internet dzi be Texas tɔɖɔɖɔ si dzɔ le July 2025 me la me tɔwo nye Donald Trump ƒe megbeŋutɔwo, eye wokpɔa nu si wotsɔ ɖo nya ŋui.
evidence: Le July 6, 2025 dzi la, Texas Dɔdzikpɔhaa ƒe nyanuɖela aɖe gblɔ be, ɖɔkta aɖe si gblɔ be yewɔ "nyaʋiʋli kple dzikudodo gã aɖe" le Texas ƒe July 4 lia ƒe kwasiɖanuwuwu me ku ɖe tsiɖɔɖɔ si gblẽa nu le Texas ŋu la ŋu la ƒe nya aɖe si wogblɔ la ku ɖe ɖɔkta Christina Propst, si nye Blue Fish Pediatrics ƒe ɖɔkta ŋu. Blue Fish Pediatrics gblɔ le July 5 kple 6, 2025 dzi be ɖɔkta aɖe si gblɔ be yewɔ nya ɖe Texas tsiɖɔɖɔ si na "vevesese gã aɖe kple dzikudodo" ŋu la megava nɔ dɔ wɔm le dɔdzikpɔƒea o. Nya siawo megblɔ be woxɔ dɔdzikpɔlaa o. Le July 4, 2025 me la, esi tsiɖɔɖɔa gblẽ ame 100 ya teti le Texas o alo wòdo kpoe le Texas la, nyatakaka aɖe si (si woŋlɔ ɖe aɖakaɖodzinuwo ŋu) va nɔ ta hem ɖe Internet dzi be Houston ɖɔkta aɖe si nye ɖɔkta aɖe si woyɔna be Christina Trump si nɔ Texas tsiɖɔɖɔa dzi la ƒe nu lé ɖe asi le Internet dzi le esime wòde nyatakaka aɖe ɖe afi

claim: Àte ŋu aɖo dze na RBG le telefon dzi be wòade asi agbalẽ aɖe si me nàgblɔ na wò senatɔgbui be wòagaxɔ ɖe Rut Bader Ginsberg teƒe le Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ me o va se ɖe esime 2020 ƒe tiatiawo nava yi.
evidence: Dɔ gbeadzi si nye Resistbot le Apple Messages, WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, Telegram alo text dzi na 50409 nàɖo nyabiase siwo woɖo la ŋu. Le miniti ʋɛ aɖewo megbe la, àva dze ka kple Kongres alo wò ame bubuwo. Ʋu wò lɛta la ale be wòate ŋu akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe edzi wu. Ne èzãa SMS la, woate ŋu azã nyatakakawo kple nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Nyagbɔgblɔ ƒe didime to vovo. Text stop na 50409 nàdzudzɔ nyatakakawo katã. Text help na 50409 nàkpɔ kpekpeɖeŋu. Kpɔ míaƒe nyatakakawo, nyatakakawo kple nyatakakawo.

claim: Le September 2025 me la, nyatakaka siwo woɖe ɖe Internet dzi nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo dzi la ɖe agbalẽ aɖe si dzi ɖola Alan Dershowitz ŋlɔ ɖo tsɔ de dzesi ale si woɖe Vanity Fair ƒe nyatakakawo le Jeffrey Epstein ƒe dzigbezã ƒe ŋkeke 50 lia dzi la fia.
evidence: Le September 2025 me la, ame siwo nɔ social media dzi la de dzesi agbalẽ aɖe si dzi ɖum ɖɔkta Alan Dershowitz le si wogblɔ be ele nu siwo dzi ɖum le eƒe dzigbezã ƒe ŋkeke 50 lia dzi la me. Woxɔe se be Epstein, si ŋu wogblɔ be ƒomedodo nɔ kple ame xɔŋkɔ aɖewo, ku le gaxɔ me le ƒe 2019 me esime wònɔ sex-trafficking ƒe nya me dzrom. Le September 8 lia dzi la, U.S. House Oversight Committee (U.S. House Oversight Committee) do ŋkeke si dzi wòɖe srɔ̃ tso ye ŋu la ƒe agbalẽa ɖe wo nɔewo me le esi wotia Dershowitz ƒe agbalẽ si ku ɖe ame si ŋu wobu be enye gbɔdɔdɔdɔdɔdɔwɔla la ŋu la ta.

claim: Le e-mail si wò kple eƒe hadɔwɔla Ghislaine Maxwell do goe le House Oversight Committee me le November 2025 me la, ame si wɔ gbɔdɔdɔdɔ ƒe fuwɔame Jeffrey Epstein yɔe be "avu si meʋui o" eye wògblɔ be Trump nɔ gbɔdɔdɔ ŋuti dɔwɔnawo wɔla aɖe gbɔ gaƒoƒo geɖe le Epstein ƒe aƒe me.
evidence: Nya siwo wogblɔ le Internet dzi le November 2025 me la ɖee fia be ame siwo nɔ anyi le nyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo nye emails si me woɖe nyatakaka siwo wu 20,000 ɖe go na Dɔa ƒe Dzikpɔɖodzikpɔla kple Dziɖuɖua Ƒe Dzadzraɖoƒea ƒe Kɔmitia la va xɔ ŋkɔ le November 2025 me. Nyatakaka siwo ɖee fia be e-mail si me woɖe nyatakaka siwo wu 20,000 ɖe go le ame siwo ŋu woda alakpa le la dome la ɖee fia be Epstein kple eƒe hadɔwɔla Ghislaine Maxwell siaa xɔe le E-mail dzi, eye Epstein gblɔ be Donald Trump nye "aƒenɔ si meʋã nu o" eye wògblɔ be ele be yeava nɔ "aƒenɔƒe" eye wògblɔ be ele be yeava nɔ "aƒenɔƒe" la me gaƒoƒo geɖe. Nya siwo wogblɔ tso eŋu la na be ame geɖe siwo nɔ Snopes ƒe agbalẽa xlẽm va kpɔ be yewoakpɔe be e-mail la nye nyateƒe.

" Be woawu ɖoɖo si dziɖuɖua ɖo la nu la, ele be Senate la naxɔ se ɖe ɖoɖo aɖe si dziɖuɖua ɖo do ŋgɔ be wòagaɖo dziɖuɖu anyi la dzi. claim: Ame siwo le Amerika ƒe agbledelawo katã dome dometɔ 40 le alafa me nye dutanyanyuigblɔla siwo meŋlɔ agbalẽ aɖeke o.
evidence: Le akɔntabubu si USDA ƒe nyatakaka siwo li fifia la nu la, agbledela siwo wɔa dɔ le agble me ƒe xexlẽme si nye 40%  amesiwo wɔa dɔ le atikutsetsewo, numiemiewo kple nukuwo me, le kpɔɖeŋu me  womena mɔ wo be woawɔ dɔ le United States le ƒe 2020 va se ɖe 2022 me o. Le ƒe siwo nye 2020-2022 me la, akɔntabubu si nye 40% me la meƒo nu tso agbledela siwo wɔa dɔ le agble me le se nu le ƒe 2020-2022 me ŋu o  eye meƒo nu tso lãnyiƒe alo agbledela siwo wɔa dɔ le agble me hã ŋu o. Le ƒe 2023 me kple emegbe ƒe xexlẽme siwo womekpɔ o la megali o le ɣeyiɣi si me woŋlɔ agbalẽ sia ɖo me. Le ƒe 2025 me la, amewo le nyatakakawo sem le nyatakakawo me be, U.S.S. agbledela siwo katã wɔa dɔ le agble me ƒe xexlẽme si nye 40% ye nye esiwo womeŋlɔ ɖe agbalẽ me o. Le X, Reddit kple Facebook ƒe nyatakakawo me la, wogblɔ be akɔntabubu si wogblɔ be "ameŋɔŋlɔgbalẽwo mele ame siwo le agble me o" dometɔ ɖeka

claim: Nya aɖe si wogblɔna le Internet dzi la ɖee fia be Ajit Doval de dzi ƒo na Indiatɔwo be woadzudzɔ Amazon-haʋunyawɔwɔ be yewoate ŋu ado ŋusẽ United States le ganyawo me.
evidence: Nuwɔwɔ ɖe foto aɖe si me wogblɔ be Ajit Doval, si nye Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe Dzitsinyaŋuɖoɖola, gblɔ be ele be yewoadzudzɔ Amazon ƒe dɔwɔnua ɖoɖo ɖa be yewoatsɔ ado ŋusẽ United States le ganyawo me le ganyawo me la va zu viral le Internet dzi nyatakakawo me. Nya sia fia be ame gbogbo aɖewo ƒe tsatsa le mɔ̃a dzi awɔ nu ɖe Amerika ƒe domenyiŋusẽwo ŋu vevie. Mina míanyae ne Ajit Doval wɔ nya sia vavã hã. Míate ŋu akpɔ afi sia. (Agbeɖekɛ) NM VERIFIED NewsMobile kpɔ nya sia ɖa eye wòkpɔe be nuwɔwɔ ɖe video si nɔ dzodzom la nye mɔ aɖe si kplɔa ame yia nu me. NM ƒe ƒuƒoƒo la dze eƒe numekuku gɔme to numekukuwɔwɔ ɖe nyatakaka si nye viral si wotsɔ ɖe Ajit Doval dzi le Amazon kple ale si wobu be enye tarifɔwo ŋuti aʋa la me me. Nya siawo katã fia be Indiatɔwo ate ŋu ana Amerika ƒe domenyiŋusẽ gã aɖe to Amazon ƒe mɔ̃a dzi le woƒe asitelefonwo dzi kpɔkpɔ me.

claim: Le December 2025 me la, United States Immigration and Customs Enforcement dɔwɔlawo le Minneapolis la lé Amerikatɔ si xɔ ƒe 55 ƒe, si ŋkɔe nye Sue Tincher, si nɔ woƒe dɔwɔnawo kpɔm la ɖe asi.
evidence: Le December 9, 2025 ƒe ŋdi me la, U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement dɔwɔlawo wɔ amedzrowɔwɔ dɔ le North 21st kple North Oliver avenues si le Minneapolis gbɔ. Le nyatakaka siwo woɖe ɖe go le Internet dzi la, dɔwɔlawo lé Sue Tincher, si nye Amerikatɔ si nɔ dɔ siawo wɔm la kpɔ. Esi wolé wo ɖe ga me la, dɔwɔlawo tsɔ ŋɔdzi na Snopes ƒe srɔ̃ɖigblemɔ̃a eye wolé eƒe srɔ̃ɖigblemɔ̃a hãe. Snopes xlẽlawo lé nyatakakawo me kpɔ eye wogblɔ na mí be wonye nyateƒe. Míekpɔe be wonye nyateƒe, togbɔ be dɔwɔlawo mete ŋu kpɔ egbɔ le mɔ sia nu be wotsi Tincher ƒe srɔ̃ɖigblemɔ̃a o hã. Gake ame geɖe siwo ƒo nu kple Snopes le afi ma la gblɔ be Snopes ƒe srɔ̃ɖigblemɔ̃a kple eƒe srɔ̃ɖigblemɔ̃a ƒe nyatakakawo va ɖo DHS ƒe Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe Kpeɖeŋutɔ la gbɔ.

evidence: Dukplɔla la de asi asi asi asi Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe si kpɔa Lãmesẽ kple Subɔsubɔhawo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔlawo ƒe Dzikpɔla (HHS) dzi be wòatsɔ afɔ vovovo aɖe atsɔ ana be Amerika-dɔnɔwo nakpɔ atike siwo wotsɔna toa atikewo dzi, siwo dome insulin kple epinephrine le, ƒe gazazã dzi kpɔtɔ, eye woakpɔ egbɔ be Amerika-dɔnɔwo le woƒe atikewo xɔm ɖe dziƒoe.

claim: Kenneth Petty, si nye rapper Nicki Minaj srɔ̃, nye gbɔdɔdɔdɔwɔla si dze aglã.
evidence: Le December ƒe nuwuwu lɔƒo me la, habɔbɔ si nye ame siwo kpɔa viɖe tso nu nyui wɔwɔ ŋu ƒe habɔbɔ si woyɔna be Turning Point USA (TPUSA) wɔ eƒe ƒe sia ƒe takpekpe le Phoenix, Arizona. Le wɔna sia me la, TPSUA ƒe nufiala Erika Kirk, si nye habɔbɔa ƒe nufiala Charlie Kirk srɔ̃, kplɔ ame tɔxɛ aɖe va kplɔa wo ɖo, si nye rapper Nicki Minaj. Dɔ si dzɔ le afi ma la he nya geɖe va nɔ nu ƒom tso Minaj ŋu le afi siwo le abe X ene, eye ame aɖewo ƒe nu lé dzi ɖe eŋu le afi ma. Gake ame aɖewo siwo tsia tsitre ɖe eŋu la mewɔ nuku o. Wogblɔ be Minaj srɔ̃ nye ame si dze dɔ gbɔdɔdɔ gɔme le mɔ̃ɖokpe dzi eye woɖɔa nuwɔna mawo kpɔ kple ame siwo ƒe nu lé fu ame ƒe gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe nuwɔnawo ƒe nyahehe siwo wotsɔ ɖe U.S.S.A. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ŋu la. Snopes lé ŋku ɖe Minaj srɔ̃ ŋu eye wokpɔe be enye ɖevi aɖe ŋu.

claim: Le gaƒoƒo etɔ̃ me tso May 11 lia ƒe nuwuwu va se ɖe May 12, 2026 ƒe gɔmedzedze la, U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ŋlɔ nu zi 55 le eƒe Truth Social ka me.
evidence: Le May 11, 2026 dzi la, ame geɖe de dzesi nu siwo Trump gblɔ le Truth Social nyatakakadzraɖoƒea. Togbɔ be wonya be Trump ɖe gbeƒã nya siwo doa dziku le nyatakakadzraɖoƒea hã la, eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ƒe didime dze egɔme tso ŋdi ga 10:14 EDT dzi va se ɖe May 12 ƒe ŋdi me gɔ̃ hã. Robert Reich, si nye Trump ŋutagbɔgblɔla kple dɔwɔɖuiŋunɔla tsã le Amerika Fia Bill Clinton ƒe dziɖuɣi la, gblɔ be Trump ɖe gbeƒãe le Truth Social nyatakakadzraɖoƒea le gaƒoƒo etɔ̃ me. Snopes xlẽlawo hã de ŋugble le míaƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea be yewoakpɔe ɖa be Trump ɖe gbeƒãe alea hã. Egagblɔ be: Eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo dometɔ aɖewoe nye susu manyomanyowo, nuŋububu siwo mebu be ame aɖeke mebu naneke o le 2020 ƒe tiatiawo ŋu, eye wo dometɔ aɖewoe nye be ewɔa nu si ana woahe eƒe futɔwo ƒe dziɖuɖua ƒe dziɖulanyenye. Menye be ame aɖeke mehiã ŋkuɖodzinya aɖeke o. Trump ƒe mɔ̃wo mele eme o

claim: Le ƒe 2025 me la, Chobani nɔ ʋunyaʋunya wɔm le ƒuƒoƒo aɖe si gblɔ be ye ƒe yogurtwo me phthalates le, si nye atike siwo ŋu woda asi ɖo na hormone ƒe gbegblẽ.
evidence: Le October ƒe nuwuwu lɔƒo me la, nyatakaka aɖe si Chobani do ɖe Internet dzi la gblɔ be: "Dɔwɔƒe la gblɔ be yeatsɔ nya la aƒu gbe le se si woɖe na ye la me le August ƒe se aɖe si woxɔ me. Se ma menɔ amewo si o le ɣeyiɣi si me woɖe eme o. Le October ƒe nuwuwu lɔƒo me la, nyatakaka aɖe si woɖe na ame siwo zãa Internet dzi hahoowo la gblɔ be Chobani le klalo aɖe si me wobia be yeƒe "ŋutilãwo katã" ƒe yogurt aɖewo me la le atike siwo woyɔna be phthalates siwo ŋu wotsi tre ɖo na hormone ƒe nu gblẽm le ŋu la me tom. Le Facebook-gbalẽ aɖe si woɖe ɖe go (si woŋlɔ ɖe afi ma) nu la, ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea gblɔ be Chobani "do alakpanyawo ɖe gbeƒãɖeɖe to nusiwo ŋu wogblɔna be wonye 'ŋutilãwo' la me togbɔ be numekuku siwo wowɔ le ɖokuisinɔnɔ me kpɔ mɔ̃ vovovo siwo ŋu wokpɔa phthalates le eƒe nu siwo me mele kple yevu blibo siwo me Helagbe me o me hã".

"Ðe wòdo dzesi gã aɖe ɖe asi be ele aʋatso ge na wò esi nègblɔ nya ma?" Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., bia Kennedy. evidence: Gake kpeɖodzi aɖewo li be N-95 nutata zazã ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe le dɔnɔ siwo si dzodzoewo ƒe dɔléle li xoxo me ate ŋu ana be carbon dioxide ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ aɖe nanɔ wo me.

claim: Facebook xe mɔ na nu siwo le ɖoɖowɔɖi si nye Radio Quebec si Alexis Cossette-Trudel wɔ dzi la.
evidence: QAnon nye mega-dziɖoɖowo ƒe nufiafia si me susu mele o eye kpeɖodzi aɖeke mele o, si gblɔ be aʋakɔ la ɖo Donald Trump fia be wòaxɔ ŋgɔ atsɔ akpɔ dukɔa ta tso ŋutsuvi siwo léa fu ɖeviwo me o la me. Nyitsɔ laa la, eƒe nyaʋiʋli siwo nɔ edzi yim la he amewo va afɔku me. Togbɔ be xɔsetɔ aɖewo va le xexea me ŋutɔŋutɔ hã la, zi geɖe la, nu siwo ta dzi ɖikeke mele o la ƒe akpa gãtɔ le Internet dzi. Eye emegbe, le Martia ƒe zã me la, wòɖe asi le nyaʋiʋli me. Ame aɖe le asi tum be yeatsɔ nuŋububu ƒe nufiafia la ƒe dzesi aɖe aɖo anyi le dukɔmeƒenuɖoƒea, si ŋu Trump ate ŋu akpɔ nyuie.

claim: Jackie Mitchell, si xɔ ƒe 17, he baseball-nyaŋkɔ Babe Ruth kple Lou Gehrig va do goe le ƒe 1931 me le Chattanooga Lookouts kple New York Yankees ƒe kamedefe aɖe me.
evidence: Le nyatakaka siwo nɔ Internet dzi ƒe geɖe la, wogblɔ be ɖetugbui aɖe ƒo baseball-nyaŋutinya Babe Ruth kple Lou Gehrig ɖe megbe. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, nya aɖe si xɔ ame geɖe ɖe gbe aɖe gbe gblɔ be Jackie Mitchell si xɔ ƒe 17 tsɔ abɔlɔ̃a ƒe ƒuƒoƒe le Chattanooga Lookouts ƒe ɖeɖefia aɖe me eye wòƒoƒola gã eveawo ɖe megbe, gake ame si nye amegã la ɖe asi le eƒe dɔwɔɖui ŋu eye wòyɔ fefe la be "sesẽ akpa" na nyɔnuwo ŋkeke aɖewo le Mitchell ƒe baseball ƒe dzidzedze megbe. Nyadzɔdzɔ si woŋlɔ le afi ma gblɔ be: Eƒo Ruth kple Babe Mitchell ɖe megbe eye wòƒo eƒe ƒuƒoƒe ɖe megbe le Chattanooga Lookouts ƒe ɖeɖefia sia me.

claim: Le nyaƒoɖeamenu aɖe si wowɔ le Air Force One dzi la, Amerika Dukplɔla Donald Trump gblɔ na nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽŋlɔla aɖe be: "Zi ɖoɖoe, fiẽ!" esi wòbia nu tso Jeffrey Epstein ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo ɖeɖefia ŋu.
evidence: Le November 2025 me la, United States House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform ɖe agbalẽ siwo wu 20,000 siwo ku ɖe ŋutsu kple nyɔnu ƒe gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe nu vlo wɔwɔ dzila Jeffrey Epstein ŋu la ɖe go, eye emawo dometɔ aɖewo nye emails siwo woɖayɔ tso eƒe kaɖidɔ me be woaƒo nu tso Donald Trump, si nye nyɔnua ƒe xɔlɔ̃ si nɔ anyi ƒe geɖe la ŋu. Esi wonɔ lalam be House vote aɖe si ana Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya ƒe Dɔdzikpɔƒea naɖe Epstein ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo ɖe go la dzi la, ame geɖe nɔ nya hem tso nusi Epstein nya tso Trump ŋu ŋu ŋu ŋu. Video siwo kaka ɖe Internet dzi be Trump ɖe kaɖidɔla aɖe si bia be woaɖe asi le nuŋlɔɖiawo ŋu la ŋu gblɔ be, "Zi ɖo, piggy!" Nu siwo le ete la nye nyateƒenyawo eye woɖee fia be Trump yɔa nyadzɔdzɔgblɔla aɖe be "piggy". Snopes yi edzi lé ŋku ɖe video siwo woxlẽ la ŋu zi geɖe eye wòlé ŋku ɖe ɖaseɖilawo ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo ŋu le yameʋua me.

claim: "Dɔ si nye dzidziɖedzi, si nɔ 9.6% le ƒe 2022 me la, va zu 4.6% le ɣleti si va yi me.
evidence: Gake eƒe nya si wògblɔ be Kenya nɔ "ƒeƒe si sɔ" kple Singapore, Malaysia kple Asia dukɔwo le ƒe 1963 me esime Kenya xɔ ɖokuisinɔnɔ la meɖi naneke o. Nyatakaka siwo wògblɔ tso bliku, sukli ƒe agbledeƒe, sukli ƒe agbledeƒe kple ga siwo woƒle kple te ƒe fetu ŋu hã mele eteƒe o. Kenya ƒe dukplɔla William Ruto, si nɔ te ɖe ale si wole agbagba dzem be yeawɔ ɖe yeƒe ŋgɔyiyi ƒe ŋugbedodowo dzi la, va do ɖe parlamentoa me le November 20, 2025 dzi be yeatsɔ yeƒe dukɔmevi etɔ̃lia ana tso esime wòxɔ eƒe dziɖuɖua le September 2022 me.

claim: Ashley St. Clair, si nye Elon Musk ƒe vi 13 lia dada la, ŋlɔ nu le X dzi tsɔ ɖo aɖaŋu na U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump be wòagblẽ srɔ̃a ɖi.
evidence: Le June 5, 2025, esime Amerika Dukplɔla Donald Trump kple Habɔbɔa ƒe amegã, Elon Musk kpakple Trump ƒe aɖaŋuɖola tsã, Elon Musk nɔ kadodo me le Internet dzi la, wogblɔ le nyatakakadzraɖoƒe be nuŋlɔla Ashley St. Clair, si wogblɔ be eyae nye Elon Musk ƒe vi 13 lia dada, ŋlɔ nu le X dzi tsɔ "nudzɔ aɖaŋuɖoɖo" na Trump. Ashley St. Clair, si nye Musk viwo dometɔ ɖeka dada, gblɔ na Trump be wòana aɖaŋuɖoɖo X/Relevant-Peach3997 le Fauxmoi Nyawo hã ɖe X dzi (si woɖe ɖe mɔ̃ dzi), Facebook (si woɖe mɔ̃ dzi), Instagram (si woɖe mɔ̃ dzi), Threads (si woɖe mɔ̃ dzi), aɖaŋuɖoɖo X (si woɖe mɔ̃ dzi) kple Blues (si woɖe mɔ̃ dzi) tsɔ kpe ɖe St. Clair ƒe "nudzɔdzɔ ŋuti aɖaŋuɖoɖo" ŋu.

Wogblɔ be wole amewo xlɔ̃m be anyigbaʋuʋu gã si gbɔna la ava anyigbaʋuʋu la ƒe nuto ma me. boblododo aɖe si nɔ anyi kpɔ. claim: New York Mets tsɔ proudizɔ si nye Amerika ƒe aflaga la ɖo teƒe na wo esime wodo dukɔa ƒe ha la le baseball-kadzidzi le June 13, 2025 dzi.
evidence: Le June ƒe domedome la, video si xɔ segbe atɔ̃ la xɔ ɖe Internet dzi, si ɖe Fiƒode ƒe dzesi aɖe le afi si woazã ɖe le New York Mets ƒe Citi Field bɔlƒoƒea la dzi. Habɔbɔa me tɔwo gblɔ be, afi siae fiƒode si le United States la xɔ ɖe teƒe le esime wole dukɔa ƒe ha dzim. Togbɔ be amewo megblɔ game si me esia dzɔ le o hã la, nyaʋiʋliwo kaka le ƒuƒoƒea ƒe ƒe ƒe sia ƒe Fiƒode ƒe zã asiekelia, si me wokpɔa dzidzɔ le LGBTQ+ ƒe haxɔsetɔwo ŋu eye wole baseball me tom le June 13, si nye ɣeyiɣi si me woɖu woƒe kamedefe si wowɔ ɖe Tampa Bay Rays ŋu la me. X-nutnutnutnutɔ aɖe si ɖe videoa (si woŋlɔ nu tso eŋu) gblɔ be: "BREAKING - The New York Mets tiae be yewoazã Fiƒode la ɖe teƒe na Amerika ƒe dzesi le dukɔa ƒe dzesi la dzi".

claim: U.S. Dudzikpɔlawo ƒe Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe Dzidzenuwɔnawo Kpɔkpɔ Dɔdzikpɔlaa Kristi Noem da akpe na Donald Trump ɖe ahom ƒe dzodzoea ƒe ƒe 2025 ƒe nuwɔɣi si me afɔku aɖeke menɔ le United States o ta, eye wògblɔ be, "Miewɔ ahomawo dzi hafi o".
evidence: Le gakpɔ sia ŋu la, Noem gblɔ le gakpɔa ƒe takpekpe aɖe si woɖena le dutoƒo le December 2, 2025 dzi be, "Aƒetɔ, èwɔ ahom ƒe azãgbe la me dɔ nyuie, eye ahom aɖeke menɔ edzi o. Eye nenemae FEMA, FEMA ... wò, wò gɔ̃ hã nètsri ahomawo o, eya ta míekpɔ ŋudzedze ɖe eŋu". Ke hã, nukoko si dze to eye Noem yi edzi nɔ eƒe FEMA ƒe nyaŋuɖoɖowo dzi la ɖee fia be xɔme la xɔ nya si wogblɔ be "mielé ahomawo ɖe asi" la abe nya aɖe si mefia be ame aɖeke mele eme o ene. Nya siwo wogblɔ le Internet dzi le December ƒe gɔmedzedze me la gblɔ be U.S. Dudzikpɔha sue Noem da akpe na Donald Trump be wòlé ame siwo le dukɔa me ɖe asi le ahom ƒe azãgbe la me ɖa le dukɔa me le ƒe 2025 me, le Noem ƒe nya si wògblɔ le White House ƒe kabinetsikpekpe aɖe si woɖena le December 2 dzi la me la ta. claim: Le April ƒe nuwuwu lɔƒo le ƒe 2026 me la, Minnesota Senate Demokratɔwo do gbe ɖa le ɖekawɔwɔ me be yewoatsi tre ɖe ame kukuwo ɖeɖe ɖa le dukɔa ƒe tiatiawo me ŋu.
evidence: Minnesota Senate Demokratwo do gbe ɖa ɖe ɖɔɖɔɖo aɖe si abia be woaɖe ame kuku siwo do goe le dukɔa ƒe nyatiaŋɔŋlɔdzesi me ɖa la ta. Le April ƒe nuwuwu lɔƒo la, nya aɖe si kaka ɖe Internet dzi be Minnesota State Democratic senatɔwo "ɖe" ame kuku siwo do goe le dukɔa ƒe nyatiaŋɔŋlɔdzesi me la ŋu. Xexlẽla X (si woŋlɔ ɖe aɖaba) ƒe nyametsotsoa fia be SAVE America, se si ana woaɖo ame siwo di be yewoado goe alo woaŋlɔ wo ŋkɔ ɖe eme to ame kuku ƒe dzesiaŋutinya dzi la, le ɖoɖo sia me. Le April ƒe nuwuwu lɔƒo la, ƒe 2026 me la, wogblɔ be Minnesota State Democratic senatɔwo "ɖe" ɖe ame kuku siwo do goe le dukɔa ƒe nyatiaŋɔŋlɔdzesi me la ŋu.

evidence: Míedzro nyatakaka atɔ̃ siwo dziɖuɖua gblɔ tso ganyawo ŋu me la me, eye wo katã sɔ. claim: Macy's nɔ eƒe Akpeɖodzizã si woawɔ le New York City le ƒe 2025 me la tsom elabena duɖula tiatia Zohran Mamdani di be yeatsɔ dɔlar biliɔn 10 ade eƒe fiasewo me be woazã Fifth Avenue.
evidence: Le kpɔɖeŋu me, Facebook axa si nye America's Last Line of Defense (ALLOD) ɖe meme aɖe ɖe go kple text reading (si woŋlɔ ɖe afi sia): New Yorktɔwo le nu xam le woƒe gbe siwo wotsɔ da ɖi le Macy ƒe gbeƒãɖeɖe be ƒe 125 ƒe Thanksgiving ɖuɖu nu yi megbe. "Dugbe me tɔ Mamdani di be míadzɔ $10 miliɔn atsɔ adzi 5th Avenue hena gaƒoƒo etɔ̃", Macy ƒe amegã Joseph A Barron gblɔ, "Ele be míaxɔ. "Le afi ma la, nyatakaka si nye be ame si nye amegã gblɔ be "ame si nye ŋkuagbãtɔ" la ƒe susuwo katã "va zu nu si nye be, "Ame si nye amegã ƒe amegã ƒe susuwo katã gbã" la ƒe susuwo katã me (si woŋlɔ ɖe afi ma): New Yorktɔwo le nu xam le woƒe gbe siwo wotsɔ da ɖi le Macy ƒe gbeƒãɖeɖe be ƒe 125 ƒe Thanksgiving ɖuɖu nu va yi megbe.

claim: Ŋutinya si ku ɖe ale si agbea de na agbea le lã si wodzra ɖo ɖi me le dzidzi megbe la nye nyateƒe.
evidence: Le ƒe 2026 ƒe gɔmedzedze la, foto kple video siwo dzena abe vi si nye abe si léa asi na orangutan ƒe fefenu ene la va xɔ aƒe ɖe Internet dzi. Nyatakaka siwo dze le Internet dzi  le X, TikTok kple Reddit hã me gblɔ be dadaa gbe "Punch the monkey" eye wòlé lã si wotsɔ ɖe asi la ɖe asi hena akɔfafa. Esime Punch nɔ dziƒonuwo ƒom le xexea me godoo la, ɖikeke le Snopes-xexlẽla siwo le nyatakakadzraɖoƒe la me be yewoakpɔ ŋutinyaa ƒe nyateƒenyenye. Nusrɔ̃la geɖe di koŋ be yewoanya ne nu siwo ku ɖe asi na singbanui si wogblẽ ɖi la ŋu la to aɖaŋudɔwɔwɔ dzi. Le Ichikawa City Zoo ƒe X-fiase (si woŋlɔ ɖe asi) si le Japan, Punch ƒe aƒe si le ƒe axa dzi la nu la, la, nya lae nye be nyateƒee. Le nyateƒe me la, esi Ichikawa City ƒe dzilawo ɖo nyatakakadzraɖoƒe be yewoxɔ asi na ye la, wogblɔ be yewoxɔ asi le Japan-sitɔwo ƒe asi aɖe dzi, gake esi yewoxɔ asi la, yewoxɔe

claim: India ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃la Gãtɔ B. R. Gavai gbugbɔ ɖe asi Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ la ƒe dzesi gbãtɔ si nye Satyameva Jayate, si trɔ zu Yato Dharmastato Jayah le Ʋɔnudrɔ̃la Gãtɔ Chandrachud ƒe ɣeyiɣia me la dzi.
evidence: Nyatakaka sia gblɔ be, le Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ D. Y. Chandrachud ƒe ɣeyiɣia me la, Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ la tsɔ eƒe dzesideŋkɔ si nye 'Satyameva Jayate' la ɖo 'Yato Dharmastato Jayah' teƒe. Egagblɔ hã be, Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ B. R. Gavai gbugbɔ Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ gbãtɔ ƒe dzesideŋkɔ si nye 'Satyameva Jayate' (ele afi sia, afi sia, kple afi sia) la ɖo anyi. Le nyati sia me la, mina míadzro nya siwo wogblɔ le nyatakaka sia me me me me la me kpɔ. Míate ŋu akpɔ nyatakaka si le afi sia ƒe tata si woɖe ɖe asii la me le afi sia.

claim: The SAVE America Act woade dzi ƒo na Amerikatɔwo be woaŋlɔ ŋkɔ (woaɖo to) le ame ŋkume ko, nu si Amerikatɔwo ƒe 5% koe wɔa egbea".
evidence: Esi Senate la dze ŋkeke geɖe ƒe ʋiʋli gɔme tso Sewɔɖodzia ŋu le March 17, dzi la, Senate me Dukɔ Nyui Ðekawo ƒe Lãmesẽ Habɔbɔa ƒe Kplɔla Chuck Schumer, si le D.N.Y., te gbe ɖe kuxi siwo wòde dzesii be seawo ahe vɛ la dzi. Sewɔɖodzia "ana ame sia ame naŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖi (adi na gbeɖeɖe) le ame ɖokui si ko, si nye nusi ame 5% koe wɔna egbea", egblɔ na nyadzɔdzɔwo. Schumer ɖo nyateƒe be se la abia be woaxe mɔ na ame siwo di be woaŋlɔ dukɔmevinyenye ƒe kpeɖodziwo ɖe yewo ŋu be woaɖo asi na yewo atsɔ aƒo nu na ame. Ke hã, ewɔ vodada le Amerika-vi siwo dea ŋkɔ le ameŋububu me ƒe agbɔsɔsɔsɔ ŋu le dɔwɔɖodogbalẽvi siwo wowɔna la nu.

claim: NASA ƒe mɔ̃ɖaŋunuwo va ke ɖe "anyigba gã" si nye ɣletinyigba aɖe si ɖea dzesi "ŋusẽ tɔxɛwo" fiana ŋu.
evidence: Le kpɔɖeŋu me, dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyalawo zã NASA ƒe Xexoplanet Survey Satellite si nye Transiting Exoplanet Survey la tsɔ ke ɖe exoplanet aɖe ŋu, si ƒe gɔmesese nye be ɣletinyigba aɖe le míaƒe ɣeɖoanyi ƒe akpa dzi. Gake nyagbɔgblɔ siwo wogblɔna be "dzidziɖedziɖeɖi" la tso nyatakakawo kple nyatakaka siwo woŋlɔ ɖe Internet dzi ku ɖe ŋufɔke ŋu me, menye NASA alo numekula siwo dome wole o. Nyagbɔgblɔ siawo nye "dzidziɖedziɖeɖi" siwo amewo wɔna zi geɖe, siwo "fiaa nu tso exoplanet aɖe ŋu menye le esi míekpɔe tẽ tso kekeli ƒe geɖe gbɔe o, ke boŋ le esi ɣletinyigba si le edzi yina ɖe eƒe ɣletivi la ŋgɔ la nana eƒe kekeli nu fafafa", le NASA ƒe nya nu. Nyagbɔgblɔ aɖe si nɔ ta keklẽm le Internet dzi le January 2026 me gblɔ be dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyalawo va ke ɖe "nyigba gã aɖe" ŋu le míaƒe ɣletinyigba dzi, menye le NASA alo numekula siwo domee wotrɔ asi le o. Nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe si wogblɔ le X-X dzi gblɔ be nufialawo gblɔ

claim: Le June 2025 me la, Britaintɔwo ƒe haƒola Piers Morgan kple Scotland haƒola Susan Boyle wɔ adzɔgbeɖeɖe eye wole srɔ̃ɖeɖe dim.
evidence: Nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe si kaka le Internet dzi le June 2025 ƒe nuwuwu la gblɔ be Piers Morgan kple Susan Boyle, Scotland-tɔ aɖe si va xɔ ŋkɔ le xexea me godoo le ƒe 2009 me esi wòɖe eɖokui ɖe reality television show Britain's Got Talent dzi la, wole srɔ̃m. Nyadzɔdzɔ sia gblɔ be, Britain-tɔ eveawo nɔ dzodzom le adzame ƒe geɖe eye fifia wole gbe dom be yewoawɔ srɔ̃, esi wolɔ̃ be yewoawɔ woƒe ƒomedodoa dzi na amewo le esi yewoalé eme ɖe adzame ƒe ewo kple edzivɔ megbe. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, Facebook-tagbe aɖe (si woŋlɔ ɖe agbalẽ me) si woɖe le June 25, 2025 dzi la gblɔ be amewo kpɔ ŋudzedze ɖe eŋu wu 5,900 ŋu.

claim: "[Agbledela siwo nye atsuviwo] tɔe nye agbleha miliɔn geɖe siwo nye anyigba ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ ƒe afã kloe, ne woƒo dukɔa ƒe anyigbawo katã nu ƒu la".

Gawu la, ele nu vevi aɖewo gbɔ tsɔm, abe ale si wònye be anyigba siwo katã woyɔ be "agbledede" la menyo o ene. Le kwasiɖa siwo va yi me le May kple June 2025 me la, X dzi nyatakaka siwo le agbledelawo dzi le X dzi la va xɔ aƒe me eye womedzra wo ɖe dzesi le South Africa ƒe agbeme kple agbledɔnuwo ŋu o. claim: Le nuŋɔŋlɔdzesi me la, míetsi ŋgɔ na China le mɔ geɖe nu.

"Aŋudɔwɔwɔ ƒe numanyamanya nye nu si dziŋɔ aɖe le dzɔdzɔm le afi ma. Míele ŋgɔ yim na China le agbɔsɔsɔ gã aɖe me", eɖe eme le January 16 lia dzi le Mar-a-Lago. Eye le January 21 lia dzi ƒe nuƒo si wòdo le World Economic Forum le Davos, Switzerland me la, eɖe eme be: "Míele ŋgɔ yim na xexea le Aŋudɔwɔwɔ ƒe numanyamanya me le agbɔsɔsɔ gã aɖe me. Míele ŋgɔ yim na China le agbɔsɔsɔ gã aɖe me".

claim: Alakpanya: Ukraine-dukɔa ƒe ame siwo nye sitsoƒedilawo dzoe le Louvre la me.
evidence: Ame siwo kpɔa nyatakakawo dzi la gblɔna be Franseawo lé Ukrainian ŋutsu eve siwo wolé de gaxɔ me le October 19, 2025, si nye nudzɔdzɔ si me woɖi tsa ɖ'a le Napoleon Collection me la me la ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo. Screenshot  t.me Le nyateƒe me la, nyatakaka siawo nye aʋatso. Foto siwo wozãna le nyatakakaawo me la ɖe Ukraine dukɔmevi eve aɖewo ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo fia, gake wonye esiwo tso teƒe bubu aɖe: le October 9, 1910 ƒe zã me la, ŋutsu siwo tsi aha tsu la dze agbagba be yewoayi aɖadi yewo ƒe nudodowo le Franseawo ƒe asrafowo ƒe amegã aɖe si le Lubelsk Opoli, si me wofia asrafowo ƒe sukudodo le la me.

claim: Le Swami Prasad Maurya megbe la, BJP MLA Yogesh Verma xɔe be woƒo ye.

claim: Nyatakaka si nɔ ɖiɖim le September 2025 me la tso 911 vavã aɖe si woɖona le North Carolina me, eye wose ame si yɔe la wònɔ ɣli dom be: "Menye amegbetɔ ye o".
evidence: Le September 2025 me la, ame siwo le nyatakakadzraɖoƒe vovovowo ɖe video siwo ɖe ale si nya sia ɖi le 911-yɔ aɖe me la me, eye wo dometɔ aɖe do ɣli be "Menye amegbetɔ o!" claim: Ŋutinya ŋutɔŋutɔ siwo tso June 2025 Israel-Iran-ʋawɔwɔ si le edzi yim la me.
evidence: Le June 13, 2025 dzi la, Israel dze amedzidzedze ɖe nu siwo wu wu wu wu wu wu 12 dzi le Iran le woƒe ŋkɔ si nye "Agblẽ Dzata" la te, eye taɖodzinu si wogblɔ be yeana woatsri Iran ƒe nukliaʋawɔnuwo wɔwɔe nye be woagawɔe o. Mina míadzro nyateƒenya si le wo megbe la me le nyati sia me. Nya si wogblɔ be: Nu siwo ŋu woƒo nu tsoe le June 2025 me la nye nu siwo ŋu woƒo nu tsoe le Israel kple Iran dome. claim: Wotsɔ FBI dɔdzikpɔlawo 274 aɖewo ɖo ameha la dome le Washington, D.C., le January 6, 2021 dzi, eye wowɔ ŋutasẽnu siwo he ʋunyaʋunya va U.S. Capitol me la.
evidence: Togbɔ be míekpɔ nyatakaka aɖe si United States House Subcommittee si va ɖo le January 6 dzi gblɔ nenema hã la, míate ŋu aka ɖe edzi le go sia me be dɔwɔla 274 koŋe woɖo ɖe ameha la dome gbe ma gbe o. Ke hã, xexlẽme ma wɔ ɖeka kple United States D.O.R. ƒe numekuku tso FBI ƒe akpa si le wɔna sia me ŋu. Le October 2025 ƒe domedome la, Amerika Dukplɔla Donald Trump ɖe eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea Truth Social dzi be "Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) ƒe dɔlawo ƒe xexlẽme le 274" ɖe eƒe amewo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo me le January 6, 2021 dzi, le Washington, D.C. (si eya ŋutɔ gblɔ be: "Ne ame aɖe nye Democrat la, ele be wòaɖe kuku na ame geɖe o la, ekema ele be wòaɖe kuku na ame geɖe".

claim: Woado Amy Coney Barrett ƒe ɖoɖoa ɖe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔa me le October 2020 me, eye Senate me akpa gãtɔ si le ame miliɔn 15 siwo mexɔ akpa sue aɖeke o la aɖo eŋu.
evidence: Esi wotia Kavanaugh le ƒe 2018 me megbe la, wobua Barrett be enye ame si ate ŋu ado le Amerika Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe dɔ me le etsɔme.[107] Le Ʋɔnudrɔ̃la Kpeɖeŋutɔ Ruth Bader Ginsburg ƒe ku megbe le September 18, 2020 dzi la, Barrett ŋu nya geɖe nɔ ɖiɖim be yeava xɔ ɖe ye teƒe.[108] Le September 26, 2020 dzi la, Trump ɖe gbeƒã be yeadi be yeatia Barrett yeatsɔ aɖo eteƒe na dɔ si Ginsburg ku la ta.[7][109] Le nyateƒe me la, Republican-tɔwo ƒe megbe na Barrett ƒe dɔdada, siwo di be yewoade asi eŋu hafi United States ƒe ƒe dukplɔla ƒe tiatiawo nava ɖo la me.[110] Enye ame si dzi Kristotɔwo ƒe ɖusime kple ame siwo kpɔa gome le hadomeɖoɖo ŋu la lɔ̃ ɖe edzi wu.[110][111][112] Le nyateƒe me la, Democrat-tɔwo tsi tre ɖe dɔdada ŋu, eye wogbe be woawu dɔdada ŋu le esime numekuku le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea me le dukɔ geɖe me xoxo.[110] Le ƒe nuwuwu la, Senatɔwo geɖe nɔ mɔ kpɔm be

claim: Asinudɔwɔwɔ ƒe nunyalawo ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo "tsɔa elektrikŋusẽ ƒe gaku 30 alo 40 le alafa me" eye "wonɔa tsi si ade galonu 500,000 gbe sia gbe la tsɔm".
evidence: Florida dziɖuɖua ƒe dzikpɔla James Fishback nye nuŋɔŋlɔdzesi ŋuti nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ƒe nyadriwɔla. Fishback, si le tsi dom ɖe U.S. Rep. Byron Donalds si nye Republican dzikpɔlawo ƒe dzikpɔkpɔ te le United States ƒe dzikpɔkpɔ te la gblɔ be, numekulawo ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo nye AI la ɖea vi geɖe na Floridatɔwo o. "Nu si tututu wowɔnae nye be wohea elektriklia ƒe fewo ɖe edzi ne woxɔna ɖe edzi wu zi 30 alo 40 le Florida me. Ame aɖe di be yeaxe ga geɖe ɖe eƒe elektriklia ƒe fewo taa? Alo nu si wowɔnae nye be, woɖua tsi gallon 500,000 le ŋkeke ɖeka me eye wohea tsi dzĩ ɖe tsiɖigbɔa me", Fishback gblɔ le February 26 dzi le Pensacola.

claim: Ame siwo katã le Amerika le atikewɔwɔ me la dometɔ blaetɔ̃ le alafa me nye ame siwo de suku le atikewɔwɔ me tso dukɔ bubuwo gbɔ, eye H-1B visa-delawo ɖoa teƒe 10,000 le teƒe 43,000 siwo dzi wole dɔ wɔm le la dome.
evidence: Donald Trump gblɔ be H-1B visa ƒe fewo dzi ɖe edzi va ɖo $100,000, eye atikewɔmɔnuwɔna aɖewo gblɔ be esia ate ŋu ana ɖɔktawo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ dzi naɖii. Tso September 21 lia dzi la, H-1B visa yeyewo ƒe fe si woana le Amerika dɔwɔlawo ŋu la axɔ $100,000, tso $2,000 va ɖo $5,000. Trump ƒe dziɖuɖu gblɔ be, fe sia nye be woagaxɔ Amerika dɔwɔlawo "aɖe wo ɖe teƒe kple dutanyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe dɔmenɔƒe siwo mexɔ fetu boo o". H-1B visa ƒe ɖoɖo si naa dɔtɔwo ƒe dɔmenɔlawo ƒe mɔ be woaxɔ dutanyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe dɔmenɔlawo le kɔnyinyi tɔxɛwo me la ana be woade dɔmenɔlawo ƒe dɔmenɔƒe le ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe me o. Dɔdzikpɔha geɖewo ŋlɔ agbalẽ na Kristo Noem, si nye Amerika Dziɖuɖumegã si kpɔa dzitsinya ta le September 25 lia dzi be woana ɖɔktawo kple ɖɔkta bubuwo ƒe dɔmenɔƒe ƒe dɔmenɔƒe ƒe fewo ƒe fe le H-1B visa yeyea me, elabena ehiã vevie be ɖɔktawo nanɔ Amerika dukɔa ƒe xexlẽme

claim: Esi U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump nɔ nu ƒom le nuɖuɖu kpɔnuteƒe si nye McDonald's ƒe wɔna aɖe dzi la, eɖe nu le tsi si "tso dziƒo" la ŋu hegblɔ be: "Eya ta èdi be yeaklɔ asia? alo abe nye ene la, medi be maklɔ nye ɖa. Meɖea tsi le eme. Eye ... tsi aɖeke mele afi ma o. ... Nyemagaƒo nu tso nu etɔ̃lia ŋu le tsiɖitsiƒe o, elabena woɖea nya ɖe ŋunye ɣesiaɣi. ... Ne mènya nu si gblɔm mele o la, ekema mègawɔ McDonald's ƒe dɔ o".
evidence: Nyatakaka aɖe si gblɔ be U.S. Nyanyuigblɔla Donald Trump gblɔ nya aɖe le nuƒo aɖe si ku ɖe asilaklɔ, taɖa kple "ame etɔ̃lia le tsiɖitsiƒe" ŋu si kaka ɖe Internet dzi le November ƒe domedome me la ŋu. Nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ siwo nye X (si woŋlɔ nu ɖe agbalẽa me), Facebook, Instagram kple Threads (si woŋlɔ nu ɖe agbalẽa me) ƒe nyatakakawo ɖee fia be Trump ƒo nu tso tsi si "tso dziƒo" ŋu kple ale si esiawo ƒe seɖoƒewo kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe nusi woate ŋu awɔ le tsiɖitsiƒe la dzi. Nyanyuigblɔla aɖewo gblɔ be nyanyuigblɔla la ɖo dze le tsiɖitsiƒea kple nya siawo dzi be: "Ne mènya nu si gblɔm mele o la, ekema mègazu McDonald ƒe dɔmenyoƒe o". Le kpɔɖeŋu me, X-tɔ aɖe gblɔ be: "Wòƒe dɔmenyoƒee nye be nàkpɔ tsi tsiɖitsiɖi.

claim: Balen Shah Nye Nepal ƒe Dziɖuɖumegã Yeyea
evidence: Le nu siwo dzɔ le Nepal nyitsɔ laa me siwo na wova ɖo ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe dziɖuɖua la, nyatakaka geɖe siwo le Internet dzi le Internet dzi nɔ gbɔgblɔm be Kathmandu Duva Balendra Shah ye nye Himalayan dukɔa ƒe Dukplɔla yeye. Video si Balendra Shah ɖe la gblɔ be: 'Nepal ƒe Dukplɔla yeyee nye Balendra Shah' (Eŋlisigbe me gɔmeɖeɖe: 'Balendra Shah zu Nepal ƒe Dukplɔla yeyea') Ŋɔŋlɔ si le etame la dze le afi sia (fififi) FACT CHECK NewsMobile kpɔ nya si wògblɔ la ɖa eye wòkpɔe be enye aʋatsonya. Nya vevi aɖe ƒe numekuku na míekpɔ nyatakaka geɖe siwo ku ɖe Nepal ƒe ɣeyiɣi kpui dziɖuɖua ŋu.

claim: Le ƒe 2016 me la, Texas D.A. Sen. Ted Cruz, si nye Ɣemaɣi la, Republican Dukplɔla ƒe dzikpɔla la gblɔ be, "Míate ŋu anɔ ŋu fɔm le ŋdi aɖe me eye Donald, ne ele dzi ɖum la, anye ne eƒoe nukliawo ɖe Denmark".
evidence: Le January 2026 me la, wota video aɖe si xɔ ƒe ewo (si woŋlɔ ɖe mɔ̃ dzi) si me Republican dziɖuɖua ƒe dzikpɔla Ted Cruz nɔ nu ƒom tso Donald Trump ŋu le dziɖuɖumɔnuwɔna aɖe si wowɔ le New Hampshire me la le Internet dzi. Le video ma nu la, senatakpɔla si tso Texas gblɔ be, "Míate ŋu anɔ ŋdi aɖe eye Donald, ne ele dziɖula me la, anye ne eƒoe dziɖuɖua awɔ nuklia tsɔ de Denmark". Nya si wogblɔ be wogblɔ la hã kaka ɖe Facebook (si woŋlɔ ɖe mɔ̃ dzi), Instagram (si woŋlɔ ɖe mɔ̃ dzi), Threads (si woŋlɔ ɖe mɔ̃ dzi), Bluesky (si woŋlɔ ɖe mɔ̃ dzi) kple Reddit (si woŋlɔ ɖe mɔ̃ dzi). Nya ma kaka ɖe eme esi tensiamewo va nɔ dzidzim ɖe edzi le esi Trump dziɖuɖu gblɔ be yeadi be yeakpɔ Greenland, si nye ƒukpo si le Arctic-nyigba si dzi Denmark le dziɖuɖua ƒe akpaɖolawo dzi la ŋu.

claim: California naa ga si sɔ gbɔ wu ale si míenaa ga tso dziɖuɖua gbɔ la ƒe dɔlar biliɔn 83.1 eye Texas naa ga si sɔ gbɔ wu ale si woawo naa ga dziɖuɖua ƒe dɔlar biliɔn 71.1 eye U.S. GDP ƒe 71% tsoa blue counties me.
evidence: Le ƒe 2028 me la, California Dziɖula Gavin Newsom, si nye Démokrat, di kpekpeɖeŋu tso ame siwo ɖoa to nuɖusi siwo nye nuŋɔŋlɔdzesi siwo me susu le la gbɔ. Nyati si nye Newsom ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔdzesi si kplɔe ɖo, si nye Shawn Ryans, va dze le July 14 dzi. Le nu si wowɔ me la, Newsom gblɔ be: "California nana dɔlar biliɔn 83.1 wu ale si míexɔa dziɖuɖua ƒe ga le dukɔa me". Newsom gblɔ le July 14 ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si ɖe nyabiasea dzi me be: "Texas? xɔa dɔlar biliɔn 71.1 wu ale si wònaa dziɖuɖua ƒe ga le dukɔa me. U.S. GDP ƒe 71% tso blue counties me. "California Crackup? Dze agbagba ake. California nana dɔlar biliɔn 83.1 wu ale si míexɔna tso dziɖuɖua gbɔ. Texas? Kpɔe ɖa, California nana dɔlar biliɔn 71.1 wu ale si míexɔna ɖe dziɖuɖua ƒe ga le dukɔa me.

claim: India-ʋakɔ ƒe amegã, Aʋafia Upendra Dwivedi lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be asrafo 250 sɔŋ ku le LOC-ʋawua me le aʋa si dzɔ le Pakistan nyitsɔ laa me.
evidence: Wogblɔ be videoa ɖe ale si woɖɔ video si me woƒo nu tso ale si asrafowo ƒe amegã Upendra Dwivedi, si nye asrafowo ƒe amegã (COAS) lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be Indiatɔwo ƒe asrafo 250 ye woku le LOC me le aʋa si dzɔ nyitsɔ laa kple Pakistan me la dzi le social media dzi. Nyatakakaɖola aɖe lé ŋku ɖe video si woŋlɔ ɖe afi ma ŋu eye wòkpɔe be wowɔ dɔ ɖe eŋu. Le video si woŋlɔ ɖe afi ma me la, si xɔ miniti eve kple edzivɔ la, wogblɔ be, "India-ʋakɔ la kpɔ nu vevi aɖewo le LOC me, eye asrafo 250 wu woƒe agbe. Pakistan kple China-ʋakɔawo hã nɔ míaƒe nunɔamesiwo ŋu kpɔm nyuie".

Nyagblɔɖia gblɔ be: ""Hardik Pandya ku le Team India me, eye wòku le Asia Cup 2025 me, eye wòku le ɣletivivivi aɖe si nye Puras Matam" (Eŋlisigbe me gɔmeɖeɖe: "Hardik Pandya ku, Team India le nu xam le Asia Cup 2025 me, eye wòku le ɣletivi aɖe si nye Pandya ƒe ku ŋu") Nyagblɔɖia dze le nyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo le afisia dzi (FACT CHECK NewsMobile fact-checked the viral claim and found it misleading). Nyagblɔɖigbe aɖe si wowɔ le keyword search me ɖee fia be nu siwo wogblɔ tso Pandya ƒe ku ŋu la mele eteƒe o. Esi wònye be Pandya ƒe dzedzeme le dukɔwo dome o ta la, nya siawo tɔgbiwo va nɔ nya gblɔm le dukɔmeviwo kple dukɔwo dome nyadzɔdzraɖoƒewo me gbidii. Míedzro Pandya ƒe nyatak

claim: Congress ɖe Seɖe 1 ƒe Memama 9 kple 10 lia ɖa le eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe
evidence: NYATI SI WÒÐE ŊU: kpɔ nyatakaka siwo le ete ɖa. Ðe Sewɔamegɔmeɖose si ku ɖe habeas corpus kple ŋusẽ si le Kongres si ŋu la ƒe akpa aɖewo dzo le United States Congress ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe do ŋgɔ na August 6, 2025a? Ẽ, nyateƒee: Axawo ƒe tata siwo woŋlɔ ɖe agbalẽ me la ŋlɔ tɔtrɔ siwo ɖe Sewɔamegɔmeɖose 9 kple 10 lia me la ɖi le Artiklo 1 lia me. Kongres Ƒe Agbalẽdzraɖoƒe si kpɔa Kongres ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe dzi la lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be woŋe aɖaba aƒu wo dzi eye wògblɔ be "kɔnusigbalẽvi aɖe" si woɖɔ ɖo tae. Sewɔamegɔmeɖeɖe alo Sewɔamegɔmeɖeɖe ŋu ŋusẽ aɖeke mele nyatakakadzraɖoƒe la dzi o. Nya si wogblɔ la dze le nyati aɖe si woɖe ɖe go le X dzi (si woŋlɔ ɖe afi sia) me le August 6, 2025 me.

claim: Florida: #51 le susu ƒe lãmesẽnyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ me, #1 le aƒe ƒe asitsatsa ƒe gazazã me, #1 le ame tsitsiwo ƒe ametafe me, #1 le gakuxiwo dzi.
evidence: Ðe Florida nye dukɔ si me nu vɔ̃ɖi wu le susuŋutilãkpɔ, ame tsitsiwo ƒe amedzimavɔ, aƒemenɔlawo ƒe asitsanuɖoɖo kple ga home dzidzi ɖe edzi me? Esiae California Nutodziɖula Gavin Newsom gblɔ. Dzɔdzɔmeƒenɔ la ƒe nutodziɖula nɔ Republican-tɔ siwo le dziɖuɖua te la ƒe gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔwo ŋu ɖem fia le X-nu siwo wòŋlɔ kple eƒe numeɖeɖewo me. Le June me, esime amewo nɔ tsitre tsim ɖe ICE ƒe dɔwɔnawo ŋu le Los Angeles la, Newsom dze dze aglã kple Republican nutodziɖulawo le woƒe dukɔmeviwo ƒe amewuwu ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ ŋuti. Le July me la, etsɔ California ƒe dɔwɔƒegã ƒe ga sɔ kple Texas ƒe ga. Fifia eɖo Florida, afi si wòagblɔe le be Trump ƒe dziɖuɖu kple Florida Nutodziɖula Ron DeSantis gblɔ be woaɖe mɔ̃ɖigbalẽ siwo ɖoa ŋku LGBT-toƒenɔlawo ƒe mɔnukpɔkpɔwo kple woƒe taɖodzinu siwo ŋu wodea bubui la ɖa.

claim: Bilawal Bhutto Zardari gblɔ be Pakistan-vi siwo nye dɔdzikpɔlawo le India ƒe Parlemenutoa me.
evidence: Wogblɔ be video si me Pakistan People's Party (PKI) ƒe Dzikpɔla Bilawal Bhutto Zardari le gbɔgblɔm be 'Pak-vi siwo le India ƒe Parlemenuto me' le eƒe dukɔa ƒe Dukɔa ƒe Dukɔa ƒe Asɔfodɔ me la le kakam ɖe Internet dzi. Nu siwo wokpɔna le video si me la ɖee fia be Bhutto Zardari le nu ƒom na Pakistan ƒe parlemenuto la be, "Ame kae dze aglã le zã me? Míate ŋu aɖe míaƒe aʋatsonyawo ɖe Indiatɔwo ƒe Dziɖuɖumegã ŋkume gɔ̃ hã le Parlemenuto la me... Mía tɔwo le woƒe (India) Parlemenuto me".

claim: Ame siwo xɔ asi le Asitɔtrɔ Le Lãmesẽ Ŋu Ŋugbe la ŋu la akpɔ ga si woxɔna le woƒe gakuxiwo me dzi ɖe edzi le ƒe 1 lia me va se ɖe November 1 lia dzi ne womegana ga si woxɔna ɖe edzi la me o, eye esia ade edzi zi eve le kɔƒenutowo me.
evidence: Esi Republican kple Democrattɔwo nɔ agbagba dzem be woaxe mɔ na dziɖuɖu ƒe ɖoɖowo le October 1 lia dzi la, woʋli wo nɔewo tso nya me be ne Republican-tɔwo mete ŋu naxe mɔ na dziɖuɖu ƒe gaxeɖenuwo o la, Amerika-dukɔwo ƒe gaxeɖenuwo anɔ dzidzim ɖe edzi, abe ale si Republican-awo di ene, alo be woaxe mɔ na Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe Nuteƒeɖoɖowo ƒe Gaxeɖenuwo ƒe Gaxeɖenuwo ƒe Gaxeɖenuwo, abe ale si Democrats-awo di ene. Le September 28 lia dzi la, le nyabiase aɖe si woɖe ɖe CBS television dzi "Face the Nation" me la, ŋkeke etɔ̃ do ŋgɔ na esime dziɖuɖu ƒe gaxeɖenuwo nu ayii la, Sen. Amy Klobuchar, D-Minn., gblɔ be ne Republican-dukɔwo mete ŋu naxe mɔ na dziɖuɖu ƒe gaxeɖenuwo ƒe gaxeɖenuwo o la, Amerika-dukɔwo ƒe gaxeɖenuwo anɔ dzidzim ɖe edzi.

claim: Le August 2025 me la, Florida D.A. me Sen. Rick Scott ɖe ga si wòxɔ le asitsatsa me la ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si wu miliɔn 26 la fia le ɣeyiɣi si dzi se la bia la nu.
evidence: Le August 2025 me la, eɖo nyatakaka aɖe ɖe X-nu si nye Nubabla Si Le Dzedzem Le X-nu me la dzi be U.S. Sen. Rick Scott, si nye Florida-tɔ, si nye Republican, ɖe dɔ siwo le adzɔge la me wu dɔlar miliɔn 26 "le ƒe ɖeka me". Ne woɖe asi le nya sia ŋu la, anye nu si tsi tre ɖe dziɖuɖu ƒe se si bia be Congressme tɔ siwo katã le (siwo dome ame aɖewo le) la ŋu be woaɖe asi le asinu siwo le dzedzem le edzi wu dɔlar 1,000 ŋu le ŋkeke 30 me la ŋu. Nya la kaka ɖe Internet dzi, eye Snopes xlẽlawo nɔ nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si le nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si le nubabla si le dzedzem le edzi yim la dim.

claim: Le November 2025 me la, U.S. Dukplɔla Trump bia tso Ʋuʋuwo Dzikpɔƒea si be wòana ɣeyiɣi ƒe fe si nye ƒe 15 ƒe ʋukulawo ƒe fe.
evidence: Le kpɔɖeŋu me, X dzi nyatakaka aɖe si woɖe ɖe go la de dzesi nɔnɔmetata aɖe si dze abe White House ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si woɖe le Nov. 10 dzi (si woŋlɔ ɖe afi ma ene): Ŋɔŋlɔ si le nɔnɔmetata la dzi gblɔ be: THE WHITE HOUSE PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP Esi wònye be ele agbagba dzem vevie be yeana ame sia ame nakpɔ mɔ na American Dream la, egbe la, Donald Trump bia tso Ʋuʋuwo Kple Ganyawo Dɔdzikpɔƒewo si be woana ʋuwo ƒe ganyawo nava eme ŋutɔŋutɔ to ƒe 15 ƒe ʋuwo ƒe gakuɖeɖe dzi! Dɔdzikpɔlawo, Duffy kple Lutnick, le dɔ wɔm le eŋu xoxo! Wotsɔa ʋuwo vɛ na Amerika! Nɔnɔmetata ma ke va dze le X kple Facebook dzi hã. Edzro be exlẽla aɖewo ɖe nya la gɔme be enye nu si me nudzɔdzɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ dzɔ le. Gake ɖeko wòdzena le wo ɖokui si be nu siwo dzɔna le X kple X dome la ƒe ŋutinya me la ƒe akpa aɖe va nɔ susu me na ame aɖeke o.

claim: Ŋutsu si menye Amerika-du me tɔ o la tia Mamdani le NYC duɖulawɔƒe.
evidence: Menye nyateƒee o: Afiɖakaa lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be fewuɖuɖu koe wònye le nyaa me. Be woagblẽ woƒe fewuɖuɖua ɖi la, woɖe afi si wokpɔa gome le nyatiagbalẽvi si me Zohran Mamdani ƒe ŋkɔ le la ƒe nɔnɔmetata le. Nyatiagbalẽvi bubue wotsɔna ɖoa New York-dua me ame siwo me womeŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖo o, eye woŋlɔa agbalẽwo ɖe wo si me woŋlɔ kpe ɖe kpeɖodzi siwo ɖee fia be wole New York-dua me. Nya la dze le X.com kaɖitsi aɖe si nye @YazanXBT (si woŋlɔ ɖe afi sia) me le November 4, 2025 me, si gblɔ be: "Meva New York-Dziƒeduƒe ŋkeke evee nye esi va yi la nyemenye Amerika-dukɔ alo Mamman o, eye nu si me meva ɖo la dze abe ale si wònɔ le gɔmedzedzea me ene.

claim: Freddie Mercury, si nye haƒola si le ha la ƒe ŋgɔgbe la, medzɔa "xexea me" o le ha la ƒe nuwuwu "We Are the Champions, Queen" si woɖe ɖe go zi gbãtɔ le ƒe 1977 me la me.
evidence: Le kpɔɖeŋu me, video siwo ku ɖe Queen ƒe kɔpiwo ŋu ɖee fia be zi geɖe la, Mercury ƒoa ha la le nuwuwu. Tso esime Queen ƒe "We Are the Champions" dze egɔme le ƒe 1977 me ke la, ame geɖe tsɔ "xexexeame ƒe" ƒe seselelãmewo ɖɔa woƒe hawo me nyawo ɖi. Gake nenemae wòtsinae nyateƒea? Nyasela aɖewo, esi woɖɔa ha la ɖo ɖe vinyl dzi kple haƒonuwo abe Spotify ene dzi la, wokpɔe be womekpɔ "xexeame ƒe" mamlɛtɔ o. Ƒe geɖee nye esia la, nyatakaka kple nyatakaka geɖe siwo wota le Internet dzi, siwo nana amewo nɔa vinyl dzi bum be enye "xexeame ƒe" ƒe dzesi, la va zu "xexeame ƒe" ƒe dzesi, gake Snopop ƒe nya aɖe gblɔ be "ameɖokui meɖokui meɖokui meɖokui meɖokui meɖokui o" le October 2023 me.

claim: U.S. aʋafia George Patton Jr. gblɔ zi ɖeka be, "Mawu neve nye futɔwo nu, elabena nyemakpɔ nublanui na wo o".
evidence: Le eƒe agbalẽ si nye "War as I Knew It" si wòŋlɔ ɖe eƒe ku megbe le ƒe 1947 me me me me me la, eƒe nyagbɔgblɔ gbãtɔ gblɔ be: "Mawu nenɔ nublanui na nye futɔwo, elabena wohiãe". Míekpɔ ɖaseɖiɖi aɖeke si ɖee fia be Patton ƒo nu alo ŋlɔ nyagbɔgblɔ si nye "Mawu nenɔ nublanui na nye futɔwo, elabena nyemele nublanui na wo o" la ɖi o. Ƒe geɖee nye esia la, ame siwo le Internet dzi nɔ nyagbɔgblɔ siwo wogblɔna be U.S. Gen. George Patton Jr. gblɔ be Xexemeʋa II ƒe asrafowo ƒe amegã la gblɔ be, "Mawu nenɔ nublanui na nye futɔwo, elabena nyemele nublanui na wo o".
