claim: AIMIM women's wing ƒe zimenɔla la kafu Deepak Kumar.
evidence: Wole foto aɖe si le kaka ɖem le Internet dzi be ele nyɔnu siwo le All India Majlis-e-Ittehadul Muslimeen (AIMIM) ƒe ha la ƒe zimedzikpɔla aɖe si le gbe dom ɖa le ame aɖe si ŋkɔe nye "Mohammad Deepak." (Axive Link) Ame kae nye Mohammad Deepak? Ŋkɔ 'Mohammad Deepak' la va xɔ ame ƒe susu le January 26, 2026 dzi, le nyaʋiʋli aɖe si nɔ edzi yim le Kotdwar, Uttarakhand, le awuƒle aɖe si nye Moslemtɔ aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Baba School Garments la ta. Le nyaʋiʋli la me la, ame aɖe si nye kamedede ƒe heheɖeŋula si ŋkɔe nye Deepak Kumar va tsi tre ɖe nyaa me. Esi wobia gbee le eƒe dzedzeme ŋu le tensiame si nɔ dzidzim ɖe edzi la, wogblɔ be etsɔ eɖokui ŋkɔ "Mohammad Deepak".

claim: "Míekpɔ mɔ ɖe [pasitelɔdzemɔ̃] siwo ade 35 ŋu siwo tsi anyi alo womewɔ dɔ o la ŋu xoxo".  Ramaphosa

Africa Check hã de dzesi Badenhorst ƒe nya si wògblɔ tso akpa si le Cape Town ƒe gadzraɖoɖomɔ̃ ƒe gazazã ƒe akpa si ayi na ƒome siwo mekpɔa ga geɖe o ŋu be enye nyateƒe, gake egblɔ nyateƒe be ƒe etɔ̃ siwo me wòzãa ga le la wu du bubuwo katã ƒe ga si le dukɔa me. Scheurkogel ƒe nya siwo gblɔ tso ʋuʋuʋu ƒe gazazã ŋu na ame dahewo kple keteke siwo me ame siwo yia la ƒe xexlẽme ŋu la sɔ gbɔ wu, eye Ramaphosa ƒe nya si wògblɔ tso keteke siwo me wotrɔna ɖo ŋu hã nye nyateƒe. claim: Alakpanya: Ðevi siwo mede ha ha ha o fifia ate ŋu awɔ asrafodɔ le Ukraine fifia.
evidence: Le nyateƒe me la, Ukraine ƒe se siwo de asi na ame siwo mexɔ ƒe 18 o la meɖea mɔ na ame siwo mexɔ ƒe 18 o be woade asrafodɔ o. Nya si wogblɔ tso Ukraine ƒe senɔla aɖe ŋu la nye aʋatsonya. Nyakakadɔwɔƒewo si ŋu Kremlin do ƒome ɖo la ƒo nu tso nya siwo wogblɔna be Ukraine na mɔ ame si xɔ ƒe 17 be woaŋlɔ dɔdeasiwo kple Asrafodɔwɔlawo ŋu la ŋu. Nyakakadɔwɔƒea yɔ nya siwo wogblɔna be Ruslan Horbenko gblɔ le television dzi be: "Wòe gblɔ be fifia, le ƒe 17 me la, ame siwo ate ŋu ade asrafodɔ la ƒe dɔdeasiwo gɔme".

claim: Asaduddin Owaisi le aarti wɔm na Aƒetɔ Hanuman le gbedoxɔ aɖe me.
evidence: Video aɖe si nɔ anyi le Internet dzi la ɖe ale si AIMIM ƒe tatɔ Asaduddin Owaisi le Hanuman aarti wɔm le afi ma, eye ame geɖe, siwo dome nunɔla aɖe hã le, le ekpɔm le egbɔ. Amesiwo zãa video sia la ɖe wo nɔewo ale gbegbe be wogblɔ be enye nyateƒe. X-tabubu si dze le @ManojSr60583090 ƒe nyatakaka aɖe me. Míedi nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe Asaduddin Owaisi ŋu le gbedoxɔ aɖe me alo le aarti wɔm ŋu le nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽwo me, gake míekpɔ nyatakaka siwo ate ŋu akpe ɖe eŋu o. Ne nenemae la, menye ɖeko eƒe videowo ɖeɖe dzaa, siwo ku ɖe eŋu la koe nɔ susu me nɛ o, ke boŋ nya siwo ku ɖe eŋu hã nɔ susu me na ame geɖe le nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽwo kple dunyahehe me.

claim: Lɛta si woŋlɔ ɖe Internet dzi le March 2026 me la nye gbedeasi si me Joe Kent, si nye Amerika ƒe Lãmesẽ Habɔbɔ si Kpɔa Dzidzenuwɔnawo Ðe Dzidzenuwɔnawo Ta la, ɖe gbeƒãe be yeagbɔ le yeƒe dɔ me le United States kple Israel ƒe aʋa si wowɔ ɖe Iran ŋu ta.
evidence: Le March 2026 me la, Joe Kent, si nye United States National Counterterrorism Center ƒe amegã, eye wònye Donald Trump ƒe megbeɖola tso ƒe 2020 me la, ɖe gbeƒã eƒe dzudzɔ le dɔ si wɔm wònɔ la ta, eye wòyɔ susu ɖe Trump ƒe aʋa si wòle kple Iran la ŋu. Nɔnɔme kple nuŋlɔɖi siwo ɖee fia be ele dɔ si wɔm le eƒe dzudzɔ la dzi la kaka ɖe Internet dzi, eye Snopes xlẽlawo yi nyatakakadzraɖoƒe la me eye woŋlɔ agbalẽ ɖe eme be yewoakpɔe ɖa be nya si woŋlɔ la nye nyateƒea. Lɛta la nye nyateƒenya; Kent ɖe eme le March 17, 2026 dzi. Kaka ɣeyiɣi sia naɖo la, eƒe X-ƒe (si woŋlɔ ɖe agbalẽa me) xɔ asi wu ame miliɔn 94 sɔŋ. Lɛta la ƒe nɔnɔmetata gblɔ be: "Le numekuku geɖe megbe la, metso nya me be maɖe asi le nye dɔ si wɔm mele abe Dudzikpɔlaa le National Counterterrorism Center me ene la ŋu, eye wòava dze egɔme egbea. Nyemate ŋu akpe ɖe aʋawɔwɔ ŋuti ame siwo le edzi yim le Iran ŋu o. Iran me la me afɔku aɖeke mele

claim: Le ƒe 1994 ƒe film si nye "Forrest Gump" me la, ame vevi aɖe gblɔ be, "Gbɔɖemevi la le abe kpluvi si me tsidzadza le ene", ke menye "Gbɔɖemevi la le abe kpluvi si me tsidzadza le ene o".
evidence: Le teƒe bubu aɖe la, ameŋutsua dada gblɔ be: "Agbea nye kplu kplu kplu si me tsokoladɔwo le, Forrest. Màte ŋu anya nu si ava dzɔ o". Le teƒe bubu aɖe la, ameŋutsua dada gblɔ be: "Agbea nye kplu si me tsokoladɔwo le, Forrest. Màte ŋu anya nu si ava dzɔ o". Wo dometɔ aɖeke meƒo nu tso nya si wogblɔna le afi sia be, "Agbemegbea le abe kplu si me tsokoladɔwo le ene" ŋu tẽe o. "Agbemegbea nye kplu si me tsokoladɔwo le". Nya siwo wogayɔna wu le film ŋutinya me dometɔ ɖeka tso ƒe 1994 me film si nye "Forrest Gump", si me Tom Hanks wɔ akpa aɖe le me. Esi Gump gblɔa eƒe agbemeŋutinya na amedzrowo le bɔs-sitimɔƒe aɖe le film la ƒe gɔmedzedze me la, eƒoa nu tso nunya si nɔ esi ŋu.

claim: Egblɔ be yeakplɔ House ƒe agbagbadzedzewo be woatu Micron ƒe nutrenuɖodɔ gã aɖe le Syracuse gbɔ.
evidence: "Edzɔ dzi nam ŋutɔ be míado go @MicronTech le eƒe ŋutinya me tsatsa le New York State me ŋu", Tenney ɖe eme le January 16 lia dzi. "Dɔwɔƒe sia ana dɔwɔla 50,000 nanɔ anyi eye wòado ŋusẽ domenɔnɔ ƒe nutsuɖekɛwo ƒe asinudɔwɔwɔ le New York City katã me. Enye bubu nam be maɖu ŋgɔ le House me le esime Congress ɖo kpe America ƒe agbagbadzedze ɖe etsɔme nyui nɔnɔ kple ŋgɔyiyi ŋu". claim: Ʋuʋui aɖe si dzɔ le BJP ƒe dziɖuɖumegã aɖe kple nutome sue dzikpɔla aɖe dome le Uttar Pradesh
evidence: Video aɖe si ɖe ŋutsu eve siwo nɔ dzre wɔm le ŋutilã me la le kaka dzi le social media dzi. Wotsɔa video sia kakam kple nya si wogblɔ be ele dzrewɔwɔ aɖe wɔm le BJP-dziɖula aɖe kple nutome sue dzikpɔla aɖe dome le Uttar Pradesh me la. Facebook-nutnutnutɔ aɖe ɖe nyatakaka si va yi la ɖe afi ma kple nya si gbɔna: Nutome sue dzikpɔla kple BJP-dziɖula dome ame aɖe tsi tre ɖe eŋu.... le UPR me...😁 Ʋuʋua le Nutome sue dzikpɔla kple BJP-dziɖula dome.... le UP me... 😁 Àte ŋu akpɔ nyatakaka si le afi sia. FACT CHECK NewsMobile kpɔ nyatakaka si va yi la ɖa eye wòkpɔ be enye aʋatsotɔ. Be woakpɔ nya si wogblɔ la, woɖe video si va yi la ƒe akpa vevi aɖewo le video si me eye wotrɔ asi le eŋu to fotowo ƒe numekuku me. Esia na nyatakaka aɖe si woɖe ɖe go le January 17, 2018, si dzi la dze le BJP Live si me, si me wokpɔ fotoawo ƒe akpa ɖekaawo le.

claim: Nu siwo wokpɔna le afi ma la fia ale si Delhi Red Fort-a tɔ ɖe anyi le November 10, 2025 dzi.
evidence: Le November 10, 2025 dzi la, ʋu aɖe tɔ le New Delhi ƒe Red Fort metro dzikpɔkpɔ titina ƒe Ʋɔtru 1 ƒe mlɔenu, eye ame wuietɔ̃ wu ame wuietɔ̃, eye ame geɖe hã xɔ abi. Wotsɔ numekuku la de asi na National Investigation Agency (NIA), eye dziɖuɖumegãwo yɔ se si ku ɖe Se Dzɔdzɔmewɔametɔwo (Tete Ðe Wo Ŋu) ŋu be woalé ŋku ɖe ŋɔdzinuwɔnawo ŋu eye wonɔ mɔ̃ siwo dzi wotona kpɔa ŋɔdzinuwɔnawo ƒe akpa aɖe (le afi sia) ŋu dim. Le nudzɔdzɔa megbe la, foto vovovo siwo nɔ amewo dome la dze go le Internet dzi nyatakakawo dzi, eye wogblɔ be yewole afi ma la ɖe dzesiwo le Delhi Red Fort-a ƒe ʋunyaʋunya ŋu. Mina míalé nya siwo wogblɔ le nyati sia me la me kpɔ. Nya si wogblɔ: Nu siwo wogblɔ le afi ma ɖe dzesiwo ɖe Delhi Red Fort-a ƒe ʋunyaʋunya si dzɔ le November 10, 2025 dzi la ŋu. Nyateƒenya: Nu siwo wogblɔ tso afi ma dometɔ aɖeke me ku ɖe Delhi Red Fort-a ƒe ʋunyaʋunya ŋu o.

claim: Arkansas ŋutsu aɖe lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yewɔ nu si ana ɖevi aɖe nanɔ afɔku me le esi wòfɔ fu na nyɔnuvi si xɔ ƒe 15 ta la ta, eye esia wɔe be wòxe mɔ na gaxɔmenɔnɔ.
evidence: Le July ƒe nuwuwu lɔƒo me la, nya siwo nɔ Internet dzi la gblɔ be Arkansas ŋutsu aɖe si wolé ɖe asi le esi wosusui be ewɔ gbɔdɔnuwo ɖe ɖevi aɖe ŋu ta la do go tso gaxɔ me esi wòxɔ nu si wòɖe fia la. Nya siwo nɔ gbɔgblɔm emegbe be gbɔdɔnuwo wɔwɔ na be ɖevi ma fɔ fu la wɔe be nyɔnu ma fɔ fu. Amegbetɔ siwo le nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo abe Facebook (si woŋlɔ ɖe anyi) kple Instagram (si woŋlɔ ɖe anyi) la kaka ŋutsu la ƒe foto ɖe nyatakaka siwo gblɔ be, "Ŋutsu aɖe fɔ vidzĩ, eye ʋɔnudrɔ̃la la na wòdzo". Amegbetɔ aɖewo gblɔ nya siwo le wo si abe "Mele nu si me wòɖe fia, gake mewɔ nuku o". Esiae nye Mason Lee Gibson si xɔ ƒe 23 eye wòdo go vidzĩ, eye wòdo go le mɔɖeɖe ɖeɖe ko!

evidence: Le March 2026 me la, nyaʋiʋli aɖe si woakeke ɖe nyatakakawo dzi le nyatakakadzraɖoƒea gblɔ be, nyɔnuvivi Helen Hunt tsɔ eƒe Academy Award-xɔ ƒe ga si wòxɔ la ƒe dɔlar miliɔn etɔ̃ na ɖevi aɖe si nye nufiala si na hehe bubuwo Hunt be wòakpe ɖe Hunt ŋu le eƒe dyslexia, si nye gbegbɔgblɔ ƒe ŋutete ƒe kuxi aɖe si me wòto la me. Nyaʋiʋliʋliʋli siwo kaka ɖe Facebook kple YouTube dzi, eye Snopes-xexlẽla geɖe va nɔ nu ƒom be yewoabia nenye be nyateƒee la nye ema. Facebook-videoa aɖe gblɔ be Hunt tsɔ eƒe $ 3 miliɔn "Oscar bonus" na nufiala aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Eleanor, si woxɔ le ƒe 1975 me be etsɔ "dzidzisɔsrɔ̃ geɖe" na Hunt ɖe eƒe dyslexia ta. claim: Dɔléle siwo amewo ɖe le Internet dzi le ƒe 2024 me la ƒo nu tso Paul McCartney ŋu tsitotsito be ele John Lennon ƒe srɔ̃ɖeɖe gbãtɔa me nyawo xɔm eye wòtrɔna na Lennon ƒe srɔ̃nyɔnu xoxoa kple nuŋlɔɖi aɖe si gblɔ nɛ be megaƒle eƒe ŋkuɖodzinyawo o.
evidence: Le kpɔɖeŋu me, Cynthia Lennon dzra John Lennon ƒe lɛta aɖewo le esime srɔ̃tɔawo gbe wo nɔewo le ƒe 1968 me, eye Paul McCartney hã ƒle ɖeka, de wo me eye wòɖo wo ɖe egbɔ. Ke hã ... ... McCartney tsɔ John Lennon ƒe lɛta ɖeka, ke menye lɛta geɖe o, eye wòwɔe ƒe geɖe, ke menye ŋkeke geɖe o, le lɛta siawo dzra megbe. Kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli be McCartney ƒe lɛta aɖe nɔ gbɔgblɔm na Cynthia Lennon be megadzra eƒe ŋkuɖodzinyawo o la le eme o. Ƒe geɖee nye esia la, Internet-nutnutnutamelawo gblɔa nya aɖe tso nu si dzi wòto kpɔna le Paul McCartney ƒe nuƒoƒo si wòɖi be yewɔ na ex-ƒenɔ John Lennon si nye eƒe Beatles-habɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔa ƒe srɔ̃a la ŋu. Nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽa gblɔ be Cynthia Lennon, si ɖe John tso ƒe 1962 me va se ɖe ƒe 1968 me eye wòku le ƒe 2015 me la, dzra lɔlɔ̃gbalẽwo tso srɔ̃a ƒe srɔ̃tɔ xɔŋkɔtɔ si nye John Lennon gbɔ be yeakpɔ

claim: Indiana setɔwo dze agbagba be yewoana se si ana dukɔa nate ŋu atsɔ gasɖakawo kple aʋawɔnu siwo woawua ame la atsɔ awui la nava eme.
evidence: Ne wònye se la va zu se la, womenya be dukɔ la atu gasɖakawo o. Dukɔ siwo zãa nitrogen gas xoxo hena ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ la zãa nu sia to nu si tsi tsitre ɖi na wo la dzi o, togbɔ be Arizona nɔ nya gblɔm be woɖɔa eƒe kuɖakawo ɖo hena etsɔme zazã. Le ƒe 2026 ƒe gɔmedzedze la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe Internet dzi be Indiana-dukɔ la ƒe setɔwo dze agbagba be yewoatu sewo siwo ana woawu amewo to gasɖakawo kple kuɖakawo dzi. Nya siwo nɔ dzɔdzɔm le afi ma la kaka ɖe nuwɔƒewo abe Facebook, X, TikTok kple Instagram ene. Snopes xlẽlawo hã ŋlɔ agbalẽ biae be Indiana nɔ gasɖakawo tum. Indiana-dukɔ sia ƒe setɔwo hã bia be yewoalé nya siawo me ɖe asi.

claim: Italy meɖe mɔ SSU-megãwo kpe ɖe Ukraine-ha la ŋu le Olimpik-kɔnuwo ɖuɣi o.

claim: "Uganda le ame siwo va, amesiwo ade miliɔn 1.2 ye va".
evidence: Gake ele eme baa be, Gregory Mugisha Muntu ya ɖo kpe edzi be Uganda ƒe vidzidziwo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme nye 70 le alafa me le agbledeƒewo ŋu, gake eɖe mɔ na dzikpɔla siwo va le Kenya la be woado gãe le woƒe vidzinuwo kple dukɔ si le Afrika Ɣedzeƒe kple Tanzania dome ŋu. Frank Bulira Kabinga gblɔ nya manyomanyo geɖe tso United Arab Emirates ŋu, eye wòde dzesii be Filipino dutanyanyuigblɔla siwo wɔa dɔ le afi ma ƒe fetu hã le wo si. Joseph Elton Mabirizi gblɔ be Uganda ƒe kpovitɔwo kple asrafowo ƒe xexlẽme ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme nye gã o. Le November 30, 2025 dzi la, wo dometɔ enyi siwo dze na dziɖuɖu le Uganda ƒe 2026 ƒe dziɖuɖua me la dometɔ atɔ̃ ɖeɖekɛ ɖeɖekɛ ɖeɖekedzia me, eye wòɖe mɔ na woƒe nukpɔsusu si le dukɔ si le Afrika Ɣedzeƒe ŋu la ŋu.

claim: Dɔ manɔsenu si le Nigeria ƒe Edo State la le alafa memama 19.
evidence: Dɔléle ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si le Edo State la ɖi tso 25.1 le alafa me le ƒe 2018 ƒe ƒe ƒe etɔ̃lia me va ɖo 19 le alafa me le ƒe 2020 ƒe ƒe ƒe etɔ̃lia me, abe ale si Nigeria Statistics Bureau (NBS) ƒe nyatakaka yeye siwo woɖe ɖe go ene. Nu si tae woxɔ dɔ le emee nye be, dɔ siwo nɔ edzi yim le nuto si me la ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si nye 6.1 le alafa me la nye dɔ siwo nɔ dzi ɖum tso dɔ siwo nɔ edzi yim le nuto si me la me la me.  Dɔléle ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si nɔ edzi yim le nuto siwo le Anyiehe-Dedzeƒe la me dometɔ atɔ̃ me nye: Akwa-I 45.2%; Baybom 27.8%; 31.6%; Rivers Delta 40.3%, 19%, kple Edo Cross 43.

claim: Nyɔnu gbãtɔ Melania Trump dzilawo va United States to ƒome ƒe ɖoɖo aɖe si wowɔ be yewoakpɔ gome le ƒomea me dzi, si woyɔna hã be "chain migration".

YouTube ƒe July 2025 ƒe video aɖe gblɔ be: Donald Trump wɔ ʋunyaʋunya aɖe ɖe amedzrowɔwɔ ƒe ŋutasesẽ ŋu - gakpɔwo, dɔdrɔ̃wo, kple amedzrowo ŋu. Gake le teƒe siwo wokpɔtɔ le la, ezã "dzraɖoƒome" si wòdo ɖi be yeatsɔ aɖe asi le ye srɔ̃wo kple srɔ̃a ŋu, evɔ woxɔa ye vi siwo nye kɔ̃wo la le wo dzilawo si eye wotsɔa wo dea gakpɔwo me. Le eƒe dziɖuɖu gbãtɔa me la, Trump dze agbagba vevie be yeakpɔ "dzraɖoƒome" si woyɔna be "dzraɖoƒomewɔna" la dzi akpɔtɔ. Eye le Trump dzilawo ƒe mɔzɔzɔwo ƒe agbalẽwo kple woƒe mɔ̃ɖaŋunuwo dzi la, wogblɔe na eƒe mɔ̃ɖaŋunuwo be, "dzraɖoƒome" ƒe xexlẽme si dzi míeto

evidence: Esi National Football League gblɔ be Grammy-babla xɔla Bad Bunny ye nye ame si awɔ ɣeyiɣi ma ƒe akpa si me woaɖu Super Bowl le le ƒe 2026 me la, nya siwo nɔ ɖiɖim le Internet dzi le October 2025 ƒe gɔmedzedze be Turning Point USA, si nye habɔbɔ si me viɖe mele o si dzi ɖela ɖedzikpɔla Charlie Kirk ɖo la, awɔ woƒe ɣeyiɣi afã ƒe wɔnawo. Dɔwɔla aɖewo tsɔ nya ma ɖe eme le Instagram (si woɖe ɖe mɔ̃ dzi), Facebook (si woɖe mɔ̃ dzi) kple X (si woɖe mɔ̃ dzi), eye wo dometɔ aɖewo tsɔ nya ma ɖe Bad Bunny ŋu kple nya si nye "Mind, you a halftime performer for the 2026 Super Bowl" la, nya siwo nɔ ɖiɖim le Internet dzi la va xɔ aƒe ɖe afi sia afi le ƒe gɔmedzedze be Turning Point USA, si nye habɔbɔ si me viɖe mele o si woɖo tso dziɖimetɔ Charlie Kirk si ɖo mɔ̃ dzi, awɔ asiɖoɖo na ame bubuwo la, awɔ asiɖoɖo na woƒe ɣeyiɣi afã ƒe wɔnawo.

claim: Megan Byron, si nye Astronomer ƒe amegã xoxo Andy Byron srɔ̃, si ƒe nuŋububuwo va do le July 2025 me le Coldplay ƒe nuɖusime le afi ma la, ɖe gbeƒã be amegã la ase eƒe nuwɔnawo gɔme.
evidence: Le July ƒe nuwuwu lɔƒo me la, esime amewo nɔ nu ƒom tso ɣeyiɣi si me nye be ame aɖe va nɔ nu ƒom tso ale si nɔviaŋusẽtɔ Andy Byron, si nye Ɣletiviŋusẽdɔwɔƒe ƒe nufialagã tsã la, va dze klo ɖe dɔwɔƒea ƒe HR dɔwɔla Kristin Cabot ŋu le "kiss cam" dzi le Coldplay ƒe nuɖusime la, wogblɔ be Byron srɔ̃, Megan Kerrigan Byron ye ŋlɔ nya aɖe le nya sia me.

claim: "Aʋawɔnu siwo dzi wohea amewo ƒe ŋusẽ ɖo la tutu nye aʋawɔwɔ.
evidence: Le March 21 dzi la, Trump ŋlɔ ɖe Truth Social dzi be: "Ne Iran meʋu mɔ bliboe, evɔ afɔku aɖeke mele eme o, ne Hormuz-tɔsisia me, le gaƒoƒo 48 me tso ɣeyiɣi sia tututu me la, United States of America awɔ aʋa kple woƒe ŋusẽbɔbɔbɔ vovovowo, eye woatsrɔ̃ wo, adze egɔme kple THE BIGGEST ONE FIRST!" Togbɔ be Trump do ŋkeke ma zi eve emegbe hã la, egblɔ le March 30 dzi le Truth be "ne Hormuz-tɔsisia meʋuʋu enumake o la, míatsrɔ̃ míaƒe lɔlɔ̃tɔ si le Iran la to nukuku kple tsrɔ̃m keŋkeŋ le woƒe elektrikŋusẽbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔbɔ

claim: Nyatakakaƒenuawo si ŋu wotɔ asii le New York-nyigba dzi la zãa  si nye ŋusẽ zazã si le aƒewo katã me le dukɔa me ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme si gbɔ eme zi eve kloe.
evidence: Esi Amerika-dukɔwo le nu siwo adzɔ ɖe nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo dzi la dzi bum eye wole viɖe siwo dona tso eme la bum la, New York-Democrat eve aɖewo gblɔ na dukɔa be wòadzudzɔ dɔ siawo wɔwɔ, eye wogblɔ be woate ŋu agblẽ nu le nuɖuɖumegãwo kple xexeame siaa ŋu. Le March 5 dzi ƒe nyati aɖe si dze le Albany Times-Union me la, New York-dukɔa ƒe senatakpɔla Liz Krueger kple takpekpea me tɔ Anna Kelles ʋli nu ɖe ɖoɖo aɖe ŋu, eye wogblɔ be nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo si ŋu wotɔ ɖo le dukɔa me ahiã "anyiŋusẽ ƒe agba gigawatts 9,5, si nye nusi nye ŋusẽ si wozãna le aƒewo katã me le dukɔa me ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme eve". New York-dukɔa ƒe setɔwo ƒe setɔwo le susu wɔm be yewoadzudzɔ nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo tutu vaseɖe esime ŋusẽ si sɔ le dukɔme tɔwo si atsɔ awɔ dɔe la ƒe dɔwo dzi. Dukɔ bubu geɖewo hã bu mɔɖeɖe sia ŋu kpɔ, togbɔ be ame aɖeke mewɔe o hã; Dukɔa ƒe Dziɖula Mills va wɔ ɖoɖo aɖe si me. Esi míeyi Janet Krueger

claim: Le March 2026 me la, U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump gblɔ tso Saudi Arabia ƒe fiavi Mohammed bin Salman ŋu be, "Menye susu me nɛ be yeado kpo nye a** o".
evidence: Video aɖe si kaka ɖe Internet dzi le March 2026 me la ɖee fia be US-Dɔnumegã Donald Trump gblɔ be Saudi Arabia ƒe fiavi Mohammed bin Salman "menɔ mɔ kpɔm be yeava nɔ nu ƒom tso nye a** ŋu o". Video sia kaka ɖe mɔ̃ vovovowo dzi, eye ame geɖe siwo nɔ nya siwo wògblɔ la gblɔ be womeka ɖe edzi be video la nye nyateƒenya o, eye wogblɔ be ɖewohĩ nunya wɔdɔe ye zãe. Agbalẽxlẽlawo bia tso Snopes si be wòalé nya si wogblɔ la me ɖe asi.
